summary_zh: 本文旨在解决计算资源受限场景下长视频理解这一关键且未得到充分研究的挑战。我们提出LongVideo-R1，一个主动的、具备推理能力的多模态大型语言模型（MLLM）代理，其设计目标是高效地进行视频上下文导航，避免穷举搜索的冗余。LongVideo-R1 的核心是一个推理模块，它利用高级视觉线索来推断最具信息量的视频片段，以便后续处理。在推理过程中，该代理从顶层视觉摘要开始进行遍历，并迭代地优化焦点，一旦获得足够知识来回答查询，就会立即停止探索过程。为了方便训练，我们首先从CGBench（一个带有 grounding 注释的视频语料库）中提取分层视频字幕，并引导 GPT-5 生成 3.3 万条高质量的思维链式推理（带工具）轨迹。 LongVideo-R1 代理基于 Qwen-3-8B 模型进行微调，采用两阶段范例：监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL），其中 RL 采用专门设计的奖励函数来最大化选择性和高效的片段导航。在多个长视频基准上的实验验证了该名称的有效性，它在问答（QA）准确性和效率之间取得了卓越的平衡。所有整理的数据和源代码都将在补充材料中提供，并将公开发布。代码和数据可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/qiujihao19/LongVideo-R1

title: VGGDrive: Empowering Vision-Language Models with Cross-View Geometric Grounding for Autonomous Driving
summary: The significance of cross-view 3D geometric modeling capabilities for autonomous driving is self-evident, yet existing Vision-Language Models (VLMs) inherently lack this capability, resulting in their mediocre performance. While some promising approaches attempt to mitigate this by constructing Q&A data for auxiliary training, they still fail to fundamentally equip VLMs with the ability to comprehensively handle diverse evaluation protocols. We thus chart a new course, advocating for the infusion of VLMs with the cross-view geometric grounding of mature 3D foundation models, closing this critical capability gap in autonomous driving. In this spirit, we propose a novel architecture, VGGDrive, which empowers Vision-language models with cross-view Geometric Grounding for autonomous Driving. Concretely, to bridge the cross-view 3D geometric features from the frozen visual 3D model with the VLM's 2D visual features, we introduce a plug-and-play Cross-View 3D Geometric Enabler (CVGE). The CVGE decouples the base VLM architecture and effectively empowers the VLM with 3D features through a hierarchical adaptive injection mechanism. Extensive experiments show that VGGDrive enhances base VLM performance across five autonomous driving benchmarks, including tasks like cross-view risk perception, motion prediction, and trajectory planning. It's our belief that mature 3D foundation models can empower autonomous driving tasks through effective integration, and we hope our initial exploration demonstrates the potential of this paradigm to the autonomous driving community.
tldr: The paper introduces VGGDrive, a novel architecture that enhances Vision-Language Models by integrating cross-view geometric grounding from 3D foundation models, improving performance on various autonomous driving tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了VGGDrive，一种新的架构，通过集成来自3D基础模型的跨视角几何 grounding 来增强视觉-语言模型，从而提高在各种自动驾驶任务上的性能。
summary_zh: 跨视角3D几何建模能力对于自动驾驶的重要性不言而喻，然而，现有的视觉-语言模型(VLMs)本质上缺乏这种能力，导致其表现平庸。虽然一些有前景的方法尝试通过构建问答数据进行辅助训练来缓解这个问题，但它们仍然无法从根本上赋予VLMs全面处理各种评估协议的能力。因此，我们开辟了一条新途径，倡导将成熟的3D基础模型的跨视角几何基准注入VLMs，以弥补自动驾驶领域这一关键能力差距。秉承这一精神，我们提出了一种新颖的架构VGGDrive，它赋予视觉-语言模型跨视角几何基准，用于自动驾驶。具体而言，为了将来自冻结的视觉3D模型的跨视角3D几何特征与VLM的2D视觉特征连接起来，我们引入了一个即插即用的跨视角3D几何赋能器(CVGE)。CVGE解耦了基础VLM架构，并通过分层自适应注入机制有效地赋予VLM 3D特征。大量的实验表明，VGGDrive在包括跨视角风险感知、运动预测和轨迹规划等五个自动驾驶基准测试中，增强了基础VLM的性能。我们相信，成熟的3D基础模型可以通过有效集成来增强自动驾驶任务，我们也希望我们的初步探索能够向自动驾驶社区展示这种范式的潜力。

title: GA-Drive: Geometry-Appearance Decoupled Modeling for Free-viewpoint Driving Scene Generatio
summary: A free-viewpoint, editable, and high-fidelity driving simulator is crucial for training and evaluating end-to-end autonomous driving systems. In this paper, we present GA-Drive, a novel simulation framework capable of generating camera views along user-specified novel trajectories through Geometry-Appearance Decoupling and Diffusion-Based Generation. Given a set of images captured along a recorded trajectory and the corresponding scene geometry, GA-Drive synthesizes novel pseudo-views using geometry information. These pseudo-views are then transformed into photorealistic views using a trained video diffusion model. In this way, we decouple the geometry and appearance of scenes. An advantage of such decoupling is its support for appearance editing via state-of-the-art video-to-video editing techniques, while preserving the underlying geometry, enabling consistent edits across both original and novel trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GA-Drive substantially outperforms existing methods in terms of NTA-IoU, NTL-IoU, and FID scores.
tldr: GA-Drive is a novel driving simulator that generates free-viewpoint driving scenes by decoupling geometry and appearance using diffusion models, allowing for realistic and editable simulations.
tldr_zh: GA-Drive 是一种新型驾驶模拟器，通过使用扩散模型解耦几何和外观来生成自由视角的驾驶场景，从而实现逼真且可编辑的模拟。
summary_zh: 自由视点、可编辑且高保真的驾驶模拟器对于训练和评估端到端自动驾驶系统至关重要。在本文中，我们提出 GA-Drive，一种新颖的模拟框架，能够通过几何-外观解耦和基于扩散的生成，沿用户指定的新轨迹生成相机视图。给定沿已记录轨迹捕获的一组图像以及相应的场景几何，GA-Drive 使用几何信息合成新的伪视图。 随后，使用训练好的视频扩散模型将这些伪视图转换为逼真的视图。 这样，我们就解耦了场景的几何和外观。 这种解耦的一个优点是支持通过最先进的视频到视频编辑技术进行外观编辑，同时保留底层几何结构，从而能够在原始轨迹和新轨迹上实现一致的编辑。 大量实验表明，GA-Drive 在 NTA-IoU、NTL-IoU 和 FID 分数方面显著优于现有方法。

title: From Pairs to Sequences: Track-Aware Policy Gradients for Keypoint Detection
summary: Keypoint-based matching is a fundamental component of modern 3D vision systems, such as Structure-from-Motion (SfM) and SLAM. Most existing learning-based methods are trained on image pairs, a paradigm that fails to explicitly optimize for the long-term trackability of keypoints across sequences under challenging viewpoint and illumination changes. In this paper, we reframe keypoint detection as a sequential decision-making problem. We introduce TraqPoint, a novel, end-to-end Reinforcement Learning (RL) framework designed to optimize the \textbf{Tra}ck-\textbf{q}uality (Traq) of keypoints directly on image sequences. Our core innovation is a track-aware reward mechanism that jointly encourages the consistency and distinctiveness of keypoints across multiple views, guided by a policy gradient method. Extensive evaluations on sparse matching benchmarks, including relative pose estimation and 3D reconstruction, demonstrate that TraqPoint significantly outperforms some state-of-the-art (SOTA) keypoint detection and description methods.
tldr: This paper introduces TraqPoint, a reinforcement learning framework that optimizes keypoint detection for long-term trackability in image sequences, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in sparse matching benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了TraqPoint，一个强化学习框架，它优化了图像序列中关键点的长期可追踪性，并在稀疏匹配基准测试中优于最先进的方法。
summary_zh: 基于关键点的匹配是现代三维视觉系统，如运动结构恢复（SfM）和 SLAM 的一个基础组成部分。大多数现有的基于学习的方法都在图像对上进行训练，这种范式未能显式地针对在具有挑战性的视角和光照变化下，关键点在序列中的长期可跟踪性进行优化。在本文中，我们将关键点检测重新定义为一个序列决策问题。我们引入了 TraqPoint，一个新颖的、端到端的强化学习（RL）框架，旨在直接在图像序列上优化关键点的 **Track-质量 (Traq)**。我们的核心创新是一个轨迹感知的奖励机制，它在策略梯度方法的指导下，共同鼓励关键点在多个视角下的一致性和独特性。在稀疏匹配基准测试（包括相对姿态估计和三维重建）上的大量评估表明，TraqPoint 显著优于一些最先进（SOTA）的关键点检测和描述方法。

title: Efficient and Explainable End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Masked Vision-Language-Action Diffusion
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have emerged as promising candidates for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, these models typically face challenges in inference latency, action precision, and explainability. Existing autoregressive approaches struggle with slow token-by-token generation, while prior diffusion-based planners often rely on verbose, general-purpose language tokens that lack explicit geometric structure. In this work, we propose Masked Vision-Language-Action Diffusion for Autonomous Driving (MVLAD-AD), a novel framework designed to bridge the gap between efficient planning and semantic explainability via a masked vision-language-action diffusion model. Unlike methods that force actions into the language space, we introduce a discrete action tokenization strategy that constructs a compact codebook of kinematically feasible waypoints from real-world driving distributions. Moreover, we propose geometry-aware embedding learning to ensure that embeddings in the latent space approximate physical geometric metrics. Finally, an action-priority decoding strategy is introduced to prioritize trajectory generation. Extensive experiments on nuScenes and derived benchmarks demonstrate that MVLAD-AD achieves superior efficiency and outperforms state-of-the-art autoregressive and diffusion baselines in planning precision, while providing high-fidelity and explainable reasoning.
tldr: This paper introduces MVLAD-AD, a novel masked diffusion model for autonomous driving that improves efficiency, action precision, and explainability by using discrete action tokenization and geometry-aware embedding learning.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了MVLAD-AD，一种用于自动驾驶的新型掩码扩散模型，通过使用离散动作标记化和几何感知嵌入学习，提高了效率、动作精度和可解释性。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型(LLMs)和视觉-语言模型(VLMs)已成为端到端自动驾驶领域中极具潜力的候选方案。然而，这些模型通常面临推理延迟、动作精度和可解释性方面的挑战。现有的自回归方法难以克服逐个token生成速度慢的问题，而先前的基于扩散的规划器又往往依赖于冗长、通用的语言token，缺乏明确的几何结构。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于自动驾驶的掩码视觉-语言-动作扩散(MVLAD-AD)，这是一种新型框架，旨在通过掩码视觉-语言-动作扩散模型，弥合高效规划和语义可解释性之间的差距。与强制将动作纳入语言空间的方法不同，我们引入了一种离散动作token化策略，从真实世界驾驶分布中构建了一个紧凑的、运动学上可行的路径点码本。此外，我们提出了几何感知嵌入学习，以确保潜在空间中的嵌入近似于物理几何度量。最后，引入了一种动作优先级解码策略来优先生成轨迹。在nuScenes及其衍生基准上的大量实验表明，MVLAD-AD实现了卓越的效率，并且在规划精度方面优于最先进的自回归和扩散基线，同时提供了高保真和可解释的推理。

title: An interactive enhanced driving dataset for autonomous driving
summary: The evolution of autonomous driving towards full automation demands robust interactive capabilities; however, the development of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models is constrained by the sparsity of interactive scenarios and inadequate multimodal alignment in existing data. To this end, this paper proposes the Interactive Enhanced Driving Dataset (IEDD). We develop a scalable pipeline to mine million-level interactive segments from naturalistic driving data based on interactive trajectories, and design metrics to quantify the interaction processes. Furthermore, the IEDD-VQA dataset is constructed by generating synthetic Bird's Eye View (BEV) videos where semantic actions are strictly aligned with structured language. Benchmark results evaluating ten mainstream Vision Language Models (VLMs) are provided to demonstrate the dataset's reuse value in assessing and fine-tuning the reasoning capabilities of autonomous driving models.
tldr: The paper introduces the Interactive Enhanced Driving Dataset (IEDD) to address the scarcity of interactive scenarios for Vision-Language-Action models in autonomous driving, offering a large-scale dataset with multimodal alignment for training and evaluating VLMs.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了交互增强驾驶数据集(IEDD)，旨在解决自动驾驶中视觉-语言-动作模型交互场景稀缺的问题，提供了一个大规模的多模态对齐数据集，用于训练和评估VLMs。
summary_zh: 朝向完全自动化的自动驾驶发展需要强大的交互能力；然而，视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的发展受到交互场景的稀疏性和现有数据中多模态对齐不足的限制。为此，本文提出了交互增强驾驶数据集（IEDD）。我们开发了一种可扩展的流程，基于交互轨迹从自然驾驶数据中挖掘百万级的交互片段，并设计了用于量化交互过程的指标。此外，通过生成语义动作与结构化语言严格对齐的合成鸟瞰图（BEV）视频，构建了 IEDD-VQA 数据集。我们提供了评估十个主流视觉语言模型（VLMs）的基准测试结果，以证明该数据集在评估和微调自动驾驶模型推理能力方面的复用价值。

title: Probing and Bridging Geometry-Interaction Cues for Affordance Reasoning in Vision Foundation Models
summary: What does it mean for a visual system to truly understand affordance? We argue that this understanding hinges on two complementary capacities: geometric perception, which identifies the structural parts of objects that enable interaction, and interaction perception, which models how an agent's actions engage with those parts. To test this hypothesis, we conduct a systematic probing of Visual Foundation Models (VFMs). We find that models like DINO inherently encode part-level geometric structures, while generative models like Flux contain rich, verb-conditioned spatial attention maps that serve as implicit interaction priors. Crucially, we demonstrate that these two dimensions are not merely correlated but are composable elements of affordance. By simply fusing DINO's geometric prototypes with Flux's interaction maps in a training-free and zero-shot manner, we achieve affordance estimation competitive with weakly-supervised methods. This final fusion experiment confirms that geometric and interaction perception are the fundamental building blocks of affordance understanding in VFMs, providing a mechanistic account of how perception grounds action.
tldr: This paper explores how Vision Foundation Models encode geometric and interaction cues for affordance reasoning, showing that combining these cues allows for zero-shot affordance estimation competitive with weakly-supervised methods.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了视觉基础模型如何编码几何和交互线索以进行可供性推理，表明结合这些线索可以在零样本情况下实现与弱监督方法相媲美的可供性估计。
summary_zh: 视觉系统真正理解可供性意味着什么？我们认为，这种理解依赖于两种互补的能力：几何感知，它识别物体中能够实现交互的结构性部分；以及交互感知，它建模了智能体的动作如何与这些部分结合。为了检验这个假设，我们对视觉基础模型（VFMs）进行了系统的探针实验。我们发现，像DINO这样的模型固有地编码了部分级别的几何结构，而像Flux这样的生成模型则包含丰富的、动词条件的空间注意力图，这些注意力图充当隐式的交互先验。至关重要的是，我们证明了这两个维度不仅仅是相关的，而且是可以组合的可供性元素。通过简单地以无训练和零样本的方式将DINO的几何原型与Flux的交互图融合，我们获得了与弱监督方法具有竞争力的可供性估计结果。这个最终的融合实验证实了几何和交互感知是VFMs中可供性理解的基本构建块，从而提供了一种解释感知如何为动作奠定基础的机制性描述。

title: SceMoS: Scene-Aware 3D Human Motion Synthesis by Planning with Geometry-Grounded Tokens
summary: Synthesizing text-driven 3D human motion within realistic scenes requires learning both semantic intent ("walk to the couch") and physical feasibility (e.g., avoiding collisions). Current methods use generative frameworks that simultaneously learn high-level planning and low-level contact reasoning, and rely on computationally expensive 3D scene data such as point clouds or voxel occupancy grids. We propose SceMoS, a scene-aware motion synthesis framework that shows that structured 2D scene representations can serve as a powerful alternative to full 3D supervision in physically grounded motion synthesis. SceMoS disentangles global planning from local execution using lightweight 2D cues and relying on (1) a text-conditioned autoregressive global motion planner that operates on a bird's-eye-view (BEV) image rendered from an elevated corner of the scene, encoded with DINOv2 features, as the scene representation, and (2) a geometry-grounded motion tokenizer trained via a conditional VQ-VAE, that uses 2D local scene heightmap, thus embedding surface physics directly into a discrete vocabulary. This 2D factorization reaches an efficiency-fidelity trade-off: BEV semantics capture spatial layout and affordance for global reasoning, while local heightmaps enforce fine-grained physical adherence without full 3D volumetric reasoning. SceMoS achieves state-of-the-art motion realism and contact accuracy on the TRUMANS benchmark, reducing the number of trainable parameters for scene encoding by over 50%, showing that 2D scene cues can effectively ground 3D human-scene interaction.
tldr: SceMoS synthesizes realistic human motion within scenes by disentangling global planning (BEV images) and local execution (heightmaps), achieving state-of-the-art results with less computational overhead than methods relying on full 3D scene representations. This approach uses 2D cues for efficient 3D human-scene interaction.
tldr_zh: SceMoS 通过解耦全局规划（BEV图像）和局部执行（高度图）来合成场景中逼真的人类运动，与依赖完整 3D 场景表示的方法相比，计算开销更低且达到最先进的结果。这种方法使用 2D 提示来实现高效的 3D 人与场景交互。
summary_zh: 在真实场景中合成文本驱动的3D人体运动需要学习语义意图（“走到沙发”）和物理可行性（例如，避免碰撞）。当前方法使用生成式框架，同时学习高层次的规划和低层次的接触推理，并依赖于计算成本高的3D场景数据，如点云或体素占用网格。我们提出了SceMoS，一个场景感知的运动合成框架，它表明结构化的2D场景表示可以作为物理基础运动合成中完整3D监督的强大替代方案。SceMoS 使用轻量级的2D线索将全局规划与局部执行分离，并依赖于：（1）一个文本条件自回归全局运动规划器，该规划器在从场景的升高角渲染的鸟瞰图（BEV）图像上运行，并使用DINOv2特征编码作为场景表示；以及（2）一个通过条件VQ-VAE训练的几何基础运动标记器，该标记器使用2D局部场景高度图，从而将表面物理直接嵌入到离散词汇表中。这种2D分解实现了效率与保真度之间的平衡：BEV语义捕获空间布局和可供性以进行全局推理，而局部高度图在没有完整3D体推理的情况下，强制执行细粒度的物理依附。SceMoS在TRUMANS基准测试中实现了最先进的运动真实性和接触精度，同时将场景编码的可训练参数数量减少了50%以上，表明2D场景线索可以有效地支撑3D人与场景的交互。

title: CLIPoint3D: Language-Grounded Few-Shot Unsupervised 3D Point Cloud Domain Adaptation
summary: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP demonstrate impressive cross-modal reasoning, extending beyond images to 3D perception. Yet, these models remain fragile under domain shifts, especially when adapting from synthetic to real-world point clouds. Conventional 3D domain adaptation approaches rely on heavy trainable encoders, yielding strong accuracy but at the cost of efficiency. We introduce CLIPoint3D, the first framework for few-shot unsupervised 3D point cloud domain adaptation built upon CLIP. Our approach projects 3D samples into multiple depth maps and exploits the frozen CLIP backbone, refined through a knowledge-driven prompt tuning scheme that integrates high-level language priors with geometric cues from a lightweight 3D encoder. To adapt task-specific features effectively, we apply parameter-efficient fine-tuning to CLIP's encoders and design an entropy-guided view sampling strategy for selecting confident projections. Furthermore, an optimal transport-based alignment loss and an uncertainty-aware prototype alignment loss collaboratively bridge source-target distribution gaps while maintaining class separability. Extensive experiments on PointDA-10 and GraspNetPC-10 benchmarks show that CLIPoint3D achieves consistent 3-16% accuracy gains over both CLIP-based and conventional encoder-based baselines. Codes are available at https://github.com/SarthakM320/CLIPoint3D.
tldr: CLIPoint3D is a novel framework for few-shot unsupervised 3D point cloud domain adaptation that leverages CLIP and prompt tuning with a lightweight 3D encoder, achieving significant accuracy gains on benchmark datasets.
tldr_zh: CLIPoint3D是一个新颖的框架，用于少样本无监督3D点云领域自适应，它利用CLIP和提示调整以及轻量级3D编码器，在基准数据集上实现了显著的精度提升。
summary_zh: 近年来，诸如CLIP之类的视觉语言模型(VLMs)展示了令人印象深刻的跨模态推理能力，其应用已从图像扩展到3D感知。然而，这些模型在领域迁移下仍然很脆弱，尤其是在从合成点云适应到真实世界点云时。传统的3D领域自适应方法依赖于大量可训练的编码器，虽然获得了较高的准确率，但牺牲了效率。我们提出了CLIPoint3D，这是第一个建立在CLIP之上的少样本无监督3D点云领域自适应框架。我们的方法将3D样本投影到多个深度图，并利用冻结的CLIP骨干网络，通过一种知识驱动的提示调优方案进行优化，该方案将高层次的语言先验知识与来自轻量级3D编码器的几何线索相结合。为了有效地适应特定任务的特征，我们对CLIP的编码器应用了参数高效的微调，并设计了一种熵引导的视图采样策略，用于选择置信度高的投影。此外，基于最优传输的对齐损失和不确定性感知的原型对齐损失共同弥合了源域和目标域之间的分布差距，同时保持了类别的可分离性。在PointDA-10和GraspNetPC-10基准测试上的大量实验表明，CLIPoint3D 在基于CLIP的和基于传统编码器的基线方法上均实现了3-16%的准确率提升。代码可在https://github.com/SarthakM320/CLIPoint3D 获取。

title: Under the Influence: Quantifying Persuasion and Vigilance in Large Language Models
summary: With increasing integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into areas of high-stakes human decision-making, it is important to understand the risks they introduce as advisors. To be useful advisors, LLMs must sift through large amounts of content, written with both benevolent and malicious intent, and then use this information to convince a user to take a specific action. This involves two social capacities: vigilance (the ability to determine which information to use, and which to discard) and persuasion (synthesizing the available evidence to make a convincing argument). While existing work has investigated these capacities in isolation, there has been little prior investigation of how these capacities may be linked. Here, we use a simple multi-turn puzzle-solving game, Sokoban, to study LLMs' abilities to persuade and be rationally vigilant towards other LLM agents. We find that puzzle-solving performance, persuasive capability, and vigilance are dissociable capacities in LLMs. Performing well on the game does not automatically mean a model can detect when it is being misled, even if the possibility of deception is explicitly mentioned. % as part of the prompt. However, LLMs do consistently modulate their token use, using fewer tokens to reason when advice is benevolent and more when it is malicious, even if they are still persuaded to take actions leading them to failure. To our knowledge, our work presents the first investigation of the relationship between persuasion, vigilance, and task performance in LLMs, and suggests that monitoring all three independently will be critical for future work in AI safety.
tldr: This paper investigates the relationship between persuasion, vigilance, and task performance in LLMs using a Sokoban game, finding that these capacities are dissociable and that LLMs can be misled even when warned about deception.
tldr_zh: 本文使用Sokoban游戏研究了大型语言模型（LLM）中的说服力、警惕性和任务表现之间的关系，发现这些能力是可分离的，即使警告了欺骗的可能性，LLM仍然可能被误导。
summary_zh: 随着大型语言模型 (LLMs) 越来越多地融入高风险的人类决策领域，了解它们作为顾问所带来的风险至关重要。要成为有用的顾问，LLMs 必须筛选大量内容，这些内容既有善意的也有恶意的，然后利用这些信息说服用户采取特定行动。这涉及到两种社会能力：警惕性（确定使用哪些信息，以及丢弃哪些信息的能力）和说服力（综合现有证据，提出令人信服的论据）。虽然现有的工作已经孤立地研究了这些能力，但很少有先前的研究探讨这些能力是如何联系起来的。在这里，我们使用一个简单的多回合推箱子谜题游戏来研究 LLMs 说服其他 LLM 智能体并对其保持理性警惕的能力。我们发现，在 LLMs 中，解谜性能、说服能力和警惕性是可以分离的能力。在游戏中表现良好并不意味着模型可以自动检测到自己何时被误导，即使提示中明确提到了欺骗的可能性。然而，LLMs 确实始终如一地调整其 token 使用量，当建议是善意的时候会使用较少的 token 进行推理，当建议是恶意的时候会使用较多的 token 进行推理，即使它们仍然被说服采取导致失败的行动。据我们所知，我们的工作首次研究了 LLMs 中说服力、警惕性和任务性能之间的关系，并表明独立监测这三者对于未来人工智能安全领域的工作至关重要。

title: Skill-Inject: Measuring Agent Vulnerability to Skill File Attacks
summary: LLM agents are evolving rapidly, powered by code execution, tools, and the recently introduced agent skills feature. Skills allow users to extend LLM applications with specialized third-party code, knowledge, and instructions. Although this can extend agent capabilities to new domains, it creates an increasingly complex agent supply chain, offering new surfaces for prompt injection attacks. We identify skill-based prompt injection as a significant threat and introduce SkillInject, a benchmark evaluating the susceptibility of widely-used LLM agents to injections through skill files. SkillInject contains 202 injection-task pairs with attacks ranging from obviously malicious injections to subtle, context-dependent attacks hidden in otherwise legitimate instructions. We evaluate frontier LLMs on SkillInject, measuring both security in terms of harmful instruction avoidance and utility in terms of legitimate instruction compliance. Our results show that today's agents are highly vulnerable with up to 80% attack success rate with frontier models, often executing extremely harmful instructions including data exfiltration, destructive action, and ransomware-like behavior. They furthermore suggest that this problem will not be solved through model scaling or simple input filtering, but that robust agent security will require context-aware authorization frameworks. Our benchmark is available at https://www.skill-inject.com/.
tldr: The paper introduces SkillInject, a benchmark to evaluate LLM agent vulnerabilities to prompt injection attacks through skill files, revealing high success rates even with frontier models and suggesting the need for context-aware authorization frameworks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SkillInject，一个用于评估LLM代理通过技能文件受到提示注入攻击的漏洞的基准，揭示了即使使用最先进的模型也存在很高的成功率，并建议需要上下文感知的授权框架。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）智能体正在迅速发展，这得益于代码执行、工具以及近期引入的智能体技能（agent skills）特性。“技能”允许用户利用专业的第三方代码、知识和指令来扩展LLM应用。虽然这能将智能体的能力扩展到新的领域，但也创建了一个日益复杂的智能体供应链，为提示注入攻击提供了新的攻击面。我们认为基于技能的提示注入是一种重大威胁，并引入SkillInject，一个用于评估广泛使用的LLM智能体通过技能文件遭受注入攻击的敏感性的基准。SkillInject包含202个注入-任务对，攻击范围从明显的恶意注入到隐藏在看似合法的指令中的微妙的、上下文相关的攻击。我们评估了前沿LLM在SkillInject上的表现，从有害指令规避的角度衡量安全性，并从合法指令遵循的角度衡量实用性。我们的结果表明，当前的智能体非常脆弱，前沿模型的攻击成功率高达80%，经常执行极其有害的指令，包括数据渗漏、破坏性行为和勒索软件式行为。此外，它们表明这个问题无法通过模型扩展或简单的输入过滤来解决，而可靠的智能体安全需要上下文感知的授权框架。我们的基准可在https://www.skill-inject.com/获取。

title: LAD: Learning Advantage Distribution for Reasoning
summary: Current reinforcement learning objectives for large-model reasoning primarily focus on maximizing expected rewards. This paradigm can lead to overfitting to dominant reward signals, while neglecting alternative yet valid reasoning trajectories, thereby limiting diversity and exploration. To address this issue, we introduce Learning Advantage Distributions (LAD), a distribution-matching framework that replaces advantage maximization with learning the advantage-induced distribution. By establishing the equivalence between the optimal policy update and an advantage-based target distribution, we derive a practical LAD objective formulated as minimizing an $f$-divergence between the policy-induced and advantage-induced distributions. This yields a gradient update that increases likelihood for high-advantage responses while suppressing over-confident probability growth, preventing collapse without requiring auxiliary entropy regularization. LAD incurs no extra training cost compared to GRPO and scales naturally to LLM post-training. In a controlled bandit setting, LAD faithfully recovers the multimodal advantage distribution, validating the theoretical formulation. Experiments on math and code reasoning tasks across several LLM backbones show that LAD reliably improves both accuracy and generative diversity.
tldr: The paper introduces Learning Advantage Distributions (LAD), a distribution-matching framework for reinforcement learning in large language models that aims to improve reasoning accuracy and generative diversity by learning the advantage-induced distribution instead of directly maximizing expected rewards, preventing overfitting.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为学习优势分布 (LAD) 的分布匹配框架，用于大型语言模型中的强化学习，旨在通过学习优势诱导分布而非直接最大化预期奖励来提高推理准确性和生成多样性，从而防止过拟合。
summary_zh: 针对大型模型推理，当前的强化学习目标主要集中在最大化期望奖励。这种范式可能会导致过度拟合于主要的奖励信号，而忽略了其他同样有效但不同的推理轨迹，从而限制了多样性和探索能力。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了学习优势分布（LAD），一种分布匹配框架，它用学习优势诱导的分布来替代优势最大化。通过建立最优策略更新和基于优势的目标分布之间的等价关系，我们推导出一种实用的LAD目标，将其形式化为最小化策略诱导的分布和优势诱导的分布之间的$f$-散度。这产生了一种梯度更新，既增加了高优势响应的可能性，又抑制了过度自信的概率增长，从而在无需辅助熵正则化的情况下防止了崩溃。与 GRPO 相比，LAD 没有额外的训练成本，并且可以自然地扩展到 LLM 后训练。在受控的 bandit 设置中，LAD 忠实地恢复了多模态优势分布，验证了理论公式。在跨多个 LLM 骨干网络的数学和代码推理任务上的实验表明，LAD 能够可靠地提高准确性和生成多样性。

title: Localized Dynamics-Aware Domain Adaption for Off-Dynamics Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: Off-dynamics offline reinforcement learning (RL) aims to learn a policy for a target domain using limited target data and abundant source data collected under different transition dynamics. Existing methods typically address dynamics mismatch either globally over the state space or via pointwise data filtering; these approaches can miss localized cross-domain similarities or incur high computational cost. We propose Localized Dynamics-Aware Domain Adaptation (LoDADA), which exploits localized dynamics mismatch to better reuse source data. LoDADA clusters transitions from source and target datasets and estimates cluster-level dynamics discrepancy via domain discrimination. Source transitions from clusters with small discrepancy are retained, while those from clusters with large discrepancy are filtered out. This yields a fine-grained and scalable data selection strategy that avoids overly coarse global assumptions and expensive per-sample filtering. We provide theoretical insights and extensive experiments across environments with diverse global and local dynamics shifts. Results show that LoDADA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art off-dynamics offline RL methods by better leveraging localized distribution mismatch.
tldr: The paper introduces LoDADA, a new approach to off-dynamics offline RL that uses localized dynamics discrepancy estimation to selectively reuse source data, outperforming existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了LoDADA，一种新的离线强化学习方法，用于处理不同动态下的数据迁移问题。LoDADA通过局部动态差异估计选择性地重用源数据，性能优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 离线异构动力学强化学习(RL)旨在利用有限的目标域数据和大量在不同转移动力学下收集的源域数据，来学习目标域策略。现有方法通常通过在状态空间上全局地或通过逐点数据过滤来解决动力学不匹配问题；这些方法可能会忽略局部跨域相似性，或导致高昂的计算成本。我们提出了一种局部动力学感知的领域自适应方法(LoDADA)，它利用局部动力学不匹配来更好地重用源数据。LoDADA对来自源和目标数据集的转移样本进行聚类，并通过领域判别估计聚类级别的动力学差异。保留来自差异较小的聚类的源转移样本，而过滤掉来自差异较大的聚类的样本。这产生了一种细粒度且可扩展的数据选择策略，避免了过于粗糙的全局假设和昂贵的每样本过滤。我们提供了理论分析，并在具有各种全局和局部动力学转移的环境中进行了大量的实验。结果表明，LoDADA通过更好地利用局部分布不匹配，始终优于最先进的异构动力学离线强化学习方法。

title: LST-SLAM: A Stereo Thermal SLAM System for Kilometer-Scale Dynamic Environments
summary: Thermal cameras offer strong potential for robot perception under challenging illumination and weather conditions. However, thermal Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) remains difficult due to unreliable feature extraction, unstable motion tracking, and inconsistent global pose and map construction, particularly in dynamic large-scale outdoor environments. To address these challenges, we propose LST-SLAM, a novel large-scale stereo thermal SLAM system that achieves robust performance in complex, dynamic scenes. Our approach combines self-supervised thermal feature learning, stereo dual-level motion tracking, and geometric pose optimization. We also introduce a semantic-geometric hybrid constraint that suppresses potentially dynamic features lacking strong inter-frame geometric consistency. Furthermore, we develop an online incremental bag-of-words model for loop closure detection, coupled with global pose optimization to mitigate accumulated drift. Extensive experiments on kilometer-scale dynamic thermal datasets show that LST-SLAM significantly outperforms recent representative SLAM systems, including AirSLAM and DROID-SLAM, in both robustness and accuracy.
tldr: LST-SLAM is a novel stereo thermal SLAM system that achieves robust and accurate performance in large-scale dynamic environments by combining self-supervised feature learning, dual-level motion tracking, geometric pose optimization, and a semantic-geometric hybrid constraint for dynamic feature suppression and loop closure detection.
tldr_zh: LST-SLAM是一种新型的立体热SLAM系统，通过结合自监督特征学习、双层运动跟踪、几何姿态优化，以及用于动态特征抑制的语义-几何混合约束与闭环检测，在大型动态环境中实现了稳健而准确的性能。
summary_zh: 热成像相机在具有挑战性的光照和天气条件下为机器人感知提供了强大的潜力。然而，热成像同步定位与地图构建(SLAM)仍然困难，这是由于不可靠的特征提取、不稳定的运动跟踪以及不一致的全局姿态和地图构建，尤其是在动态的大规模户外环境中。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种新型的大规模立体热成像SLAM系统LST-SLAM，该系统在复杂的动态场景中实现了稳健的性能。我们的方法结合了自监督热成像特征学习、立体双层运动跟踪和几何姿态优化。我们还引入了一种语义-几何混合约束，以抑制缺乏强帧间几何一致性的潜在动态特征。此外，我们开发了一个在线增量词袋模型用于回环检测，并结合全局姿态优化以减轻累积漂移。在公里级动态热成像数据集上进行的大量实验表明，LST-SLAM在鲁棒性和精度方面均显著优于最近具有代表性的SLAM系统，包括AirSLAM和DROID-SLAM。

title: Task-oriented grasping for dexterous robots using postural synergies and reinforcement learning
summary: In this paper, we address the problem of task-oriented grasping for humanoid robots, emphasizing the need to align with human social norms and task-specific objectives. Existing methods, employ a variety of open-loop and closed-loop approaches but lack an end-to-end solution that can grasp several objects while taking into account the downstream task's constraints. Our proposed approach employs reinforcement learning to enhance task-oriented grasping, prioritizing the post-grasp intention of the agent. We extract human grasp preferences from the ContactPose dataset, and train a hand synergy model based on the Variational Autoencoder (VAE) to imitate the participant's grasping actions. Based on this data, we train an agent able to grasp multiple objects while taking into account distinct post-grasp intentions that are task-specific. By combining data-driven insights from human grasping behavior with learning by exploration provided by reinforcement learning, we can develop humanoid robots capable of context-aware manipulation actions, facilitating collaboration in human-centered environments.
tldr: This paper presents a reinforcement learning approach for task-oriented grasping in humanoid robots, leveraging human grasp preferences and hand synergies to achieve context-aware manipulation in human-centered environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的人形机器人任务导向抓取方法，利用人类抓取偏好和手部协同来实现以人为本的环境下上下文感知的操作。
summary_zh: 本文探讨了人型机器人面向任务的抓取问题，强调了与人类社会规范以及任务特定目标对齐的必要性。现有的方法采用了多种开环和闭环策略，但缺乏一个能够同时抓取多个物体并考虑下游任务约束的端到端解决方案。我们提出的方法采用强化学习来增强面向任务的抓取，优先考虑智能体抓取后的意图。我们从ContactPose数据集中提取了人类抓取偏好，并基于变分自编码器 (VAE) 训练了一个手部协同模型，以模仿参与者的抓取动作。基于这些数据，我们训练了一个智能体，使其能够抓取多个物体，同时考虑不同的、任务特定的抓取后意图。通过将来自人类抓取行为的数据驱动见解与强化学习提供的探索式学习相结合，我们能够开发出能够进行情境感知操作的人型机器人，从而促进以人为中心的环境中的协作。

title: KCFRC: Kinematic Collision-Aware Foothold Reachability Criteria for Legged Locomotion
summary: Legged robots face significant challenges in navigating complex environments, as they require precise real-time decisions for foothold selection and contact planning. While existing research has explored methods to select footholds based on terrain geometry or kinematics, a critical gap remains: few existing methods efficiently validate the existence of a non-collision swing trajectory. This paper addresses this gap by introducing KCFRC, a novel approach for efficient foothold reachability analysis. We first formally define the foothold reachability problem and establish a sufficient condition for foothold reachability. Based on this condition, we develop the KCFRC algorithm, which enables robots to validate foothold reachability in real time. Our experimental results demonstrate that KCFRC achieves remarkable time efficiency, completing foothold reachability checks for a single leg across 900 potential footholds in an average of 2 ms. Furthermore, we show that KCFRC can accelerate trajectory optimization and is particularly beneficial for contact planning in confined spaces, enhancing the adaptability and robustness of legged robots in challenging environments.
tldr: This paper introduces KCFRC, a real-time algorithm for validating the reachability of potential footholds for legged robots, improving their adaptability in complex environments by efficiently checking for collisions during swing trajectories.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为 KCFRC 的实时算法，用于验证腿式机器人潜在落脚点的可达性，通过高效地检查摆动轨迹期间的碰撞，从而提高机器人在复杂环境中的适应性。
summary_zh:
摘要：
足式机器人在复杂环境中导航面临着重大挑战，因为它们需要对立足点选择和接触规划做出精确的实时决策。虽然现有研究已经探索了基于地形几何或运动学选择立足点的方法，但仍存在一个关键缺口：很少有现有方法能够高效地验证是否存在无碰撞的摆动轨迹。本文通过引入 KCFRC，一种用于高效立足点可达性分析的新方法，来弥补这一缺口。我们首先正式定义了立足点可达性问题，并建立了立足点可达性的充分条件。基于此条件，我们开发了 KCFRC 算法，该算法使机器人能够实时验证立足点可达性。我们的实验结果表明，KCFRC 具有显著的时间效率，平均只需 2 毫秒即可完成单条腿对 900 个潜在立足点的可达性检查。此外，我们还证明了 KCFRC 可以加速轨迹优化，并且特别有利于受限空间中的接触规划，从而增强了足式机器人在挑战性环境中的适应性和鲁棒性。

title: Cross domain Persistent Monitoring for Hybrid Aerial Underwater Vehicles
summary: Hybrid Unmanned Aerial Underwater Vehicles (HUAUVs) have emerged as platforms capable of operating in both aerial and underwater environments, enabling applications such as inspection, mapping, search, and rescue in challenging scenarios. However, the development of novel methodologies poses significant challenges due to the distinct dynamics and constraints of the air and water domains. In this work, we present persistent monitoring tasks for HUAUVs by combining Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) and Transfer Learning to enable cross-domain adaptability. Our approach employs a shared DRL architecture trained on Lidar sensor data (on air) and Sonar data (underwater), demonstrating the feasibility of a unified policy for both environments. We further show that the methodology presents promising results, taking into account the uncertainty of the environment and the dynamics of multiple mobile targets. The proposed framework lays the groundwork for scalable autonomous persistent monitoring solutions based on DRL for hybrid aerial-underwater vehicles.
tldr: This paper presents a deep reinforcement learning approach for persistent monitoring with hybrid aerial-underwater vehicles, using transfer learning to adapt a unified policy across air and water domains based on Lidar and Sonar data.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的混合空中水下车辆的持久监测方法，使用迁移学习来调整基于激光雷达和声纳数据的跨空中和水下领域的统一策略。
summary_zh: 混合式无人机-水下航行器 (HUAUVs) 已成为一种能够在空中和水下环境中运行的平台，在具有挑战性的场景中实现了诸如检查、测绘、搜索和救援等应用。然而，由于空中和水下领域的独特动力学和约束，新型方法的发展面临着重大挑战。 在这项工作中，我们通过结合深度强化学习 (DRL) 和迁移学习来为 HUAUVs 提供持久性监控任务，从而实现跨域适应性。 我们的方法采用在激光雷达传感器数据（空中）和声呐数据（水下）上训练的共享 DRL 架构，证明了统一策略在两种环境中的可行性。 我们进一步表明，该方法考虑了环境的不确定性和多个移动目标的动态，呈现出有希望的结果。 所提出的框架为基于 DRL 的混合空中-水下航行器的可扩展自主持久性监控解决方案奠定了基础。

title: UAMTERS: Uncertainty-Aware Mutation Analysis for DL-enabled Robotic Software
summary: Self-adaptive robots adjust their behaviors in response to unpredictable environmental changes. These robots often incorporate deep learning (DL) components into their software to support functionality such as perception, decision-making, and control, enhancing autonomy and self-adaptability. However, the inherent uncertainty of DL-enabled software makes it challenging to ensure its dependability in dynamic environments. Consequently, test generation techniques have been developed to test robot software, and classical mutation analysis injects faults into the software to assess the test suite's effectiveness in detecting the resulting failures. However, there is a lack of mutation analysis techniques to assess the effectiveness under the uncertainty inherent to DL-enabled software. To this end, we propose UAMTERS, an uncertainty-aware mutation analysis framework that introduces uncertainty-aware mutation operators to explicitly inject stochastic uncertainty into DL-enabled robotic software, simulating uncertainty in its behavior. We further propose mutation score metrics to quantify a test suite's ability to detect failures under varying levels of uncertainty. We evaluate UAMTERS across three robotic case studies, demonstrating that UAMTERS more effectively distinguishes test suite quality and captures uncertainty-induced failures in DL-enabled software.
tldr: The paper introduces UAMTERS, an uncertainty-aware mutation analysis framework for testing DL-enabled robotic software, which injects stochastic uncertainty to evaluate test suite effectiveness under varying levels of uncertainty.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为UAMTERS的不确定性感知突变分析框架，用于测试基于深度学习的机器人软件。该框架通过注入随机不确定性来评估测试套件在不同不确定性水平下的有效性。
summary_zh: 自适应机器人能够调整自身行为以应对不可预测的环境变化。这些机器人通常在其软件中集成深度学习 (DL) 组件，以支持诸如感知、决策和控制等功能，从而增强自主性和自适应性。然而，深度学习软件固有的不确定性使得确保其在动态环境中的可靠性具有挑战性。因此，人们开发了测试生成技术来测试机器人软件，而经典变异分析会将故障注入到软件中，以评估测试套件检测由此产生的故障的有效性。然而，目前缺乏针对深度学习软件固有不确定性的变异分析技术来评估其有效性。为此，我们提出了 UAMTERS，一个不确定性感知的变异分析框架，它引入了不确定性感知的变异算子，将随机不确定性显式地注入到深度学习机器人软件中，以模拟其行为中的不确定性。我们进一步提出了变异分数指标，以量化测试套件在不同不确定性水平下检测故障的能力。我们通过三个机器人案例研究评估了 UAMTERS，结果表明 UAMTERS 能够更有效地区分测试套件的质量，并能捕捉到深度学习软件中由不确定性引起的故障。

title: Smoothly Differentiable and Efficiently Vectorizable Contact Manifold Generation
summary: Simulating rigid-body dynamics with contact in a fast, massively vectorizable, and smoothly differentiable manner is highly desirable in robotics. An important bottleneck faced by existing differentiable simulation frameworks is contact manifold generation: representing the volume of intersection between two colliding geometries via a discrete set of properly distributed contact points. A major factor contributing to this bottleneck is that the related routines of commonly used robotics simulators were not designed with vectorization and differentiability as a primary concern, and thus rely on logic and control flow that hinder these goals. We instead propose a framework designed from the ground up with these goals in mind, by trying to strike a middle ground between: i) convex primitive based approaches used by common robotics simulators (efficient but not differentiable), and ii) mollified vertex-face and edge-edge unsigned distance-based approaches used by barrier methods (differentiable but inefficient). Concretely, we propose: i) a representative set of smooth analytical signed distance primitives to implement vertex-face collisions, and ii) a novel differentiable edge-edge collision routine that can provide signed distances and signed contact normals. The proposed framework is evaluated via a set of didactic experiments and benchmarked against the collision detection routine of the well-established Mujoco XLA framework, where we observe a significant speedup. Supplementary videos can be found at https://github.com/bekeronur/contax, where a reference implementation in JAX will also be made available at the conclusion of the review process.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel, differentiable, and vectorized framework for contact manifold generation in rigid-body dynamics, aiming to improve the efficiency of differentiable physics simulations by using smooth analytical signed distance primitives and a novel edge-edge collision routine.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新的、可微分的、矢量化的刚体动力学接触流形生成框架，旨在通过使用平滑的解析有符号距离原语和一种新的边-边碰撞例程来提高可微分物理模拟的效率。
summary_zh: 在机器人学中，迫切需要以快速、大规模向量化和光滑可微的方式模拟带有接触的刚体动力学。现有可微仿真框架面临的一个重要瓶颈是接触流形生成：通过一组适当分布的接触点来表示两个碰撞几何体之间的相交体积。导致此瓶颈的一个主要因素是，常用机器人仿真器的相关程序并非以向量化和可微性为主要考量而设计，因此依赖于阻碍这些目标的逻辑和控制流。我们提出一个从头开始设计的框架，旨在考虑到上述目标，尝试在以下两者之间找到平衡点：i) 常用机器人仿真器使用的基于凸图元的方法（效率高但不可微），以及 ii) 屏障方法使用的基于缓和的顶点面和边边无符号距离的方法（可微但效率低）。具体来说，我们提出：i) 一组具有代表性的光滑解析有符号距离图元来实现顶点面碰撞，以及 ii) 一种新型可微边边碰撞程序，可以提供有符号距离和有符号接触法线。通过一系列教学实验对所提出的框架进行评估，并与成熟的 Mujoco XLA 框架的碰撞检测程序进行基准测试，我们观察到显著的加速。可在 https://github.com/bekeronur/contax 找到补充视频，其中 JAX 中的参考实现也将在审查过程结束后提供。

title: Regret-Guided Search Control for Efficient Learning in AlphaZero
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) agents achieve remarkable performance but remain far less learning-efficient than humans. While RL agents require extensive self-play games to extract useful signals, humans often need only a few games, improving rapidly by repeatedly revisiting states where mistakes occurred. This idea, known as search control, aims to restart from valuable states rather than always from the initial state. In AlphaZero, prior work Go-Exploit applies this idea by sampling past states from self-play or search trees, but it treats all states equally, regardless of their learning potential. We propose Regret-Guided Search Control (RGSC), which extends AlphaZero with a regret network that learns to identify high-regret states, where the agent's evaluation diverges most from the actual outcome. These states are collected from both self-play trajectories and MCTS nodes, stored in a prioritized regret buffer, and reused as new starting positions. Across 9x9 Go, 10x10 Othello, and 11x11 Hex, RGSC outperforms AlphaZero and Go-Exploit by an average of 77 and 89 Elo, respectively. When training on a well-trained 9x9 Go model, RGSC further improves the win rate against KataGo from 69.3% to 78.2%, while both baselines show no improvement. These results demonstrate that RGSC provides an effective mechanism for search control, improving both efficiency and robustness of AlphaZero training. Our code is available at https://rlg.iis.sinica.edu.tw/papers/rgsc.
tldr: The paper introduces Regret-Guided Search Control (RGSC), an improvement to AlphaZero that uses a regret network to identify and revisit high-regret states, leading to significantly improved learning efficiency and performance in Go, Othello, and Hex.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Regret-Guided Search Control (RGSC) 的AlphaZero改进方法，通过使用遗憾网络来识别并重新访问高遗憾状态，从而显著提高了在围棋、奥赛罗和六贯棋中的学习效率和性能。
summary_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 智能体取得了显著的性能，但其学习效率远低于人类。RL 智能体需要大量的自我对弈游戏来提取有用的信号，而人类通常只需要少量的游戏，通过反复回顾出错的状态来迅速提高。这种被称为搜索控制的思想，旨在从有价值的状态重新开始，而不是总是从初始状态开始。在 AlphaZero 中，先前的工作 Go-Exploit 通过从自我对弈或搜索树中采样过去的状态来应用这种思想，但它平等地对待所有状态，而忽略了它们的学习潜力。我们提出了后悔引导搜索控制 (RGSC)，它通过一个后悔网络扩展了 AlphaZero，该网络学习识别高后悔状态，即智能体的评估与实际结果差异最大的状态。这些状态从自我对弈轨迹和 MCTS 节点中收集，存储在优先级的后悔缓冲区中，并重新用作新的起始位置。在 9x9 围棋、10x10 奥赛罗和 11x11 六贯棋中，RGSC 的性能分别比 AlphaZero 和 Go-Exploit 平均高出 77 和 89 Elo。在使用训练良好的 9x9 围棋模型进行训练时，RGSC 进一步将对阵 KataGo 的胜率从 69.3% 提高到 78.2%，而两个基线方法均未显示出任何改进。这些结果表明，RGSC 提供了一种有效的搜索控制机制，提高了 AlphaZero 训练的效率和鲁棒性。我们的代码可在 https://rlg.iis.sinica.edu.tw/papers/rgsc 获取。

title: SibylSense: Adaptive Rubric Learning via Memory Tuning and Adversarial Probing
summary: Designing aligned and robust rewards for open-ended generation remains a key barrier to RL post-training. Rubrics provide structured, interpretable supervision, but scaling rubric construction is difficult: expert rubrics are costly, prompted rubrics are often superficial or inconsistent, and fixed-pool discriminative rubrics can saturate and drift, enabling reward hacking. We present SibylSense, an inference-time learning approach that adapts a frozen rubric generator through a tunable memory bank of validated rubric items. Memory is updated via verifier-based item rewards measured by reference-candidate answer discriminative gaps from a handful of examples. SibylSense alternates memory tuning with a rubric-adversarial policy update that produces rubric-satisfying candidate answers, shrinking discriminative gaps and driving the rubric generator to capture new quality dimensions. Experiments on two open-ended tasks show that SibylSense yields more discriminative rubrics and improves downstream RL performance over static and non-adaptive baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces SibylSense, an inference-time learning approach for adapting rubric generators for RL post-training via a tunable memory bank and adversarial policy updates, demonstrating improved rubric discriminability and downstream RL performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SibylSense，一种用于调整强化学习训练后评估标准生成器的推理时学习方法。该方法通过可调整的记忆库和对抗性策略更新来实现，展示了改进的评估标准区分能力和下游强化学习性能。
summary_zh: 为开放式生成设计对齐且稳健的奖励仍然是强化学习后训练的关键障碍。评价标准提供结构化、可解释的监督，但评价标准的构建难以规模化：专家评价标准成本高昂，提示式评价标准常常流于表面或不一致，固定池判别式评价标准可能饱和和漂移，从而导致奖励操纵。我们提出了SibylSense，一种推理时学习方法，它通过可调记忆库中的已验证评价标准条目来调整一个冻结的评价标准生成器。记忆库通过验证器驱动的条目奖励进行更新，该奖励通过少量样本中参考答案-候选答案的判别间隙来衡量。SibylSense交替进行记忆库调整和评价标准对抗性策略更新，后者生成满足评价标准的候选答案，缩小判别间隙，并驱动评价标准生成器捕捉新的质量维度。在两个开放式任务上的实验表明，与静态和非自适应基线相比，SibylSense产生了更具判别性的评价标准，并提高了下游强化学习的性能。

title: Balancing Multiple Objectives in Urban Traffic Control with Reinforcement Learning from AI Feedback
summary: Reward design has been one of the central challenges for real world reinforcement learning (RL) deployment, especially in settings with multiple objectives. Preference-based RL offers an appealing alternative by learning from human preferences over pairs of behavioural outcomes. More recently, RL from AI feedback (RLAIF) has demonstrated that large language models (LLMs) can generate preference labels at scale, mitigating the reliance on human annotators. However, existing RLAIF work typically focuses only on single-objective tasks, leaving the open question of how RLAIF handles systems that involve multiple objectives. In such systems trade-offs among conflicting objectives are difficult to specify, and policies risk collapsing into optimizing for a dominant goal. In this paper, we explore the extension of the RLAIF paradigm to multi-objective self-adaptive systems. We show that multi-objective RLAIF can produce policies that yield balanced trade-offs reflecting different user priorities without laborious reward engineering. We argue that integrating RLAIF into multi-objective RL offers a scalable path toward user-aligned policy learning in domains with inherently conflicting objectives.
tldr: This paper explores extending Reinforcement Learning from AI Feedback (RLAIF) to multi-objective systems, demonstrating that it can produce balanced trade-offs in urban traffic control without extensive reward engineering.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了将人工智能反馈强化学习 (RLAIF) 扩展到多目标系统，证明了它可以在城市交通控制中产生平衡的权衡，而无需进行大量的奖励工程。
summary_zh: 奖励设计一直是现实世界强化学习 (RL) 部署的核心挑战之一，尤其是在具有多个目标的场景中。基于偏好的强化学习通过学习人类对行为结果对的偏好提供了一种有吸引力的替代方案。最近，基于人工智能反馈的强化学习 (RLAIF) 已经证明，大型语言模型 (LLM) 可以大规模生成偏好标签，从而减轻了对人工标注者的依赖。然而，现有的 RLAIF 工作通常只关注于单目标任务，尚不清楚 RLAIF 如何处理涉及多个目标的系统。在这样的系统中，冲突目标之间的权衡很难明确指定，且策略有崩溃并优化为支配性目标的风险。在本文中，我们探索了将 RLAIF 范式扩展到多目标自适应系统。我们表明，多目标 RLAIF 可以产生平衡的权衡策略，反映不同的用户优先级，而无需耗费大量精力的奖励工程。我们认为，将 RLAIF 集成到多目标 RL 中为用户对齐的策略学习提供了一条可扩展的路径，尤其是在具有内在冲突目标的领域中。

title: Vision-Language Models for Ergonomic Assessment of Manual Lifting Tasks: Estimating Horizontal and Vertical Hand Distances from RGB Video
summary: Manual lifting tasks are a major contributor to work-related musculoskeletal disorders, and effective ergonomic risk assessment is essential for quantifying physical exposure and informing ergonomic interventions. The Revised NIOSH Lifting Equation (RNLE) is a widely used ergonomic risk assessment tool for lifting tasks that relies on six task variables, including horizontal (H) and vertical (V) hand distances; such distances are typically obtained through manual measurement or specialized sensing systems and are difficult to use in real-world environments. We evaluated the feasibility of using innovative vision-language models (VLMs) to non-invasively estimate H and V from RGB video streams. Two multi-stage VLM-based pipelines were developed: a text-guided detection-only pipeline and a detection-plus-segmentation pipeline. Both pipelines used text-guided localization of task-relevant regions of interest, visual feature extraction from those regions, and transformer-based temporal regression to estimate H and V at the start and end of a lift. For a range of lifting tasks, estimation performance was evaluated using leave-one-subject-out validation across the two pipelines and seven camera view conditions. Results varied significantly across pipelines and camera view conditions, with the segmentation-based, multi-view pipeline consistently yielding the smallest errors, achieving mean absolute errors of approximately 6-8 cm when estimating H and 5-8 cm when estimating V. Across pipelines and camera view configurations, pixel-level segmentation reduced estimation error by approximately 20-30% for H and 35-40% for V relative to the detection-only pipeline. These findings support the feasibility of VLM-based pipelines for video-based estimation of RNLE distance parameters.
tldr: This paper explores using vision-language models (VLMs) to estimate horizontal and vertical hand distances from RGB video for ergonomic risk assessment of manual lifting tasks, demonstrating the feasibility of VLM-based pipelines for video-based estimation.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用视觉语言模型（VLM）从RGB视频中估计水平和垂直手部距离，用于人工抬举任务的人体工程学风险评估，证明了基于VLM的管道在基于视频的估计中的可行性。
summary_zh: 人工搬运任务是导致工作相关肌肉骨骼疾患的主要原因，有效的工效学风险评估对于量化身体暴露风险和指导工效学干预至关重要。修正版NIOSH起重方程 (RNLE) 是一种广泛使用的起重任务工效学风险评估工具，它依赖于六个任务变量，包括水平 (H) 和垂直 (V) 手距；这些距离通常通过手动测量或专用传感系统获得，且难以在实际环境中应用。我们评估了使用创新视觉-语言模型 (VLM) 从 RGB 视频流中无创估计 H 和 V 的可行性。开发了两种基于 VLM 的多阶段流程：一种是文本引导的仅检测流程，另一种是检测加分割流程。两种流程都使用文本引导的任务相关感兴趣区域定位、从这些区域提取视觉特征，以及基于 Transformer 的时间回归来估计起重开始和结束时的 H 和 V。针对一系列起重任务，通过两种流程和七种相机视角条件下的留一受试者验证，评估了估计性能。结果在流程和相机视角条件下差异显著，其中基于分割的多视角流程始终产生最小的误差，在估计 H 时达到约 6-8 厘米的平均绝对误差，在估计 V 时达到 5-8 厘米。在不同流程和相机视角配置中，相对于仅检测流程，像素级分割将 H 的估计误差降低了约 20-30%，V 的估计误差降低了 35-40%。这些发现支持了基于 VLM 的流程用于基于视频的 RNLE 距离参数估计的可行性。

title: TrajGPT-R: Generating Urban Mobility Trajectory with Reinforcement Learning-Enhanced Generative Pre-trained Transformer
summary: Mobility trajectories are essential for understanding urban dynamics and enhancing urban planning, yet access to such data is frequently hindered by privacy concerns. This research introduces a transformative framework for generating large-scale urban mobility trajectories, employing a novel application of a transformer-based model pre-trained and fine-tuned through a two-phase process. Initially, trajectory generation is conceptualized as an offline reinforcement learning (RL) problem, with a significant reduction in vocabulary space achieved during tokenization. The integration of Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) allows for the capture of trajectory-wise reward signals, leveraging historical data to infer individual mobility preferences. Subsequently, the pre-trained model is fine-tuned using the constructed reward model, effectively addressing the challenges inherent in traditional RL-based autoregressive methods, such as long-term credit assignment and handling of sparse reward environments. Comprehensive evaluations on multiple datasets illustrate that our framework markedly surpasses existing models in terms of reliability and diversity. Our findings not only advance the field of urban mobility modeling but also provide a robust methodology for simulating urban data, with significant implications for traffic management and urban development planning. The implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/Wangjw6/TrajGPT_R.
tldr: The paper introduces TrajGPT-R, a novel framework for generating urban mobility trajectories using a transformer-based model pre-trained and fine-tuned with reinforcement learning to capture mobility preferences and overcome challenges in traditional RL-based autoregressive methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了TrajGPT-R，一种新颖的框架，用于生成城市移动轨迹，该框架使用基于Transformer的模型，通过强化学习进行预训练和微调，以捕获移动偏好并克服传统基于RL的自回归方法中的挑战。
summary_zh: 移动轨迹对于理解城市动态和加强城市规划至关重要，然而，获取此类数据常常因隐私问题受阻。本研究引入了一种用于生成大规模城市移动轨迹的变革性框架，该框架采用了一种基于Transformer模型的新颖应用，该模型通过两阶段过程进行预训练和微调。最初，轨迹生成被概念化为一个离线强化学习（RL）问题，并在分词过程中实现了词汇空间的显著缩小。逆强化学习（IRL）的集成使得能够捕获轨迹级的奖励信号，利用历史数据推断个体移动偏好。随后，使用构建的奖励模型对预训练模型进行微调，有效地解决了传统基于RL的自回归方法中固有的挑战，例如长期信用分配和处理稀疏奖励环境。对多个数据集的全面评估表明，我们的框架在可靠性和多样性方面显著优于现有模型。我们的研究结果不仅推进了城市移动建模领域的发展，而且为模拟城市数据提供了一种稳健的方法，对交通管理和城市发展规划具有重要意义。该实现可在https://github.com/Wangjw6/TrajGPT_R 公开获取。

title: SurgAtt-Tracker: Online Surgical Attention Tracking via Temporal Proposal Reranking and Motion-Aware Refinement
summary: Accurate and stable field-of-view (FoV) guidance is critical for safe and efficient minimally invasive surgery, yet existing approaches often conflate visual attention estimation with downstream camera control or rely on direct object-centric assumptions. In this work, we formulate surgical attention tracking as a spatio-temporal learning problem and model surgeon focus as a dense attention heatmap, enabling continuous and interpretable frame-wise FoV guidance. We propose SurgAtt-Tracker, a holistic framework that robustly tracks surgical attention by exploiting temporal coherence through proposal-level reranking and motion-aware refinement, rather than direct regression. To support systematic training and evaluation, we introduce SurgAtt-1.16M, a large-scale benchmark with a clinically grounded annotation protocol that enables comprehensive heatmap-based attention analysis across procedures and institutions. Extensive experiments on multiple surgical datasets demonstrate that SurgAtt-Tracker consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance and strong robustness under occlusion, multi-instrument interference, and cross-domain settings. Beyond attention tracking, our approach provides a frame-wise FoV guidance signal that can directly support downstream robotic FoV planning and automatic camera control.
tldr: The paper introduces SurgAtt-Tracker, a novel framework for surgical attention tracking using spatio-temporal learning and a large-scale benchmark dataset, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance and robustness for FoV guidance in minimally invasive surgery.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SurgAtt-Tracker，一种用于手术注意力追踪的新型框架，它使用时空学习和一个大规模基准数据集，展示了在微创手术中用于FoV指导的最新性能和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 准确且稳定的视野(FoV)引导对于安全高效的微创手术至关重要，然而现有方法通常将视觉注意力估计与下游相机控制混淆，或依赖于直接的以物体为中心的假设。在这项工作中，我们将手术注意力跟踪建模为一个时空学习问题，并将外科医生的注意力建模为一个密集的注意力热图，从而实现连续且可解释的逐帧FoV引导。我们提出了SurgAtt-Tracker，一个整体框架，通过提议级别的重排序和运动感知的精细化来利用时间连贯性，从而稳健地跟踪手术注意力，而非直接回归。为了支持系统的训练和评估，我们引入了SurgAtt-1.16M，一个大规模的基准数据集，它具有临床基础的标注协议，能够跨程序和机构进行全面的基于热图的注意力分析。在多个手术数据集上进行的大量实验表明，SurgAtt-Tracker在遮挡、多器械干扰和跨域设置下均能始终如一地取得最先进的性能和强大的鲁棒性。除了注意力跟踪之外，我们的方法还提供了一个逐帧的FoV引导信号，可以直接支持下游的机器人FoV规划和自动相机控制。

title: Hybrid LLM-Embedded Dialogue Agents for Learner Reflection: Designing Responsive and Theory-Driven Interactions
summary: Dialogue systems have long supported learner reflections, with theoretically grounded, rule-based designs offering structured scaffolding but often struggling to respond to shifts in engagement. Large Language Models (LLMs), in contrast, can generate context-sensitive responses but are not informed by decades of research on how learning interactions should be structured, raising questions about their alignment with pedagogical theories. This paper presents a hybrid dialogue system that embeds LLM responsiveness within a theory-aligned, rule-based framework to support learner reflections in a culturally responsive robotics summer camp. The rule-based structure grounds dialogue in self-regulated learning theory, while the LLM decides when and how to prompt deeper reflections, responding to evolving conversation context. We analyze themes across dialogues to explore how our hybrid system shaped learner reflections. Our findings indicate that LLM-embedded dialogues supported richer learner reflections on goals and activities, but also introduced challenges due to repetitiveness and misalignment in prompts, reducing engagement.
tldr: This paper presents a hybrid dialogue system combining rule-based and LLM approaches to support learner reflections, finding that it enhances reflection depth but faces challenges in prompt consistency and alignment.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种混合对话系统，结合了基于规则的方法和大型语言模型（LLM）方法，以支持学习者的反思。研究发现，该系统可以提高反思的深度，但在提示的一致性和对齐方面面临挑战。
summary_zh: 对话系统长期以来一直支持学习者的反思，其中基于规则的理论设计提供了结构化的支架，但通常难以应对参与度的变化。与之相反，大型语言模型（LLM）可以生成语境敏感的回复，但缺乏数十年来关于学习互动应如何构建的研究成果，这引发了对其与教学理论一致性的质疑。本文提出了一种混合对话系统，该系统将LLM的响应性嵌入到符合理论的、基于规则的框架中，以支持文化响应式机器人夏令营中学习者的反思。基于规则的结构将对话建立在自我调节学习理论的基础之上，而LLM则决定何时以及如何提示更深层次的反思，从而响应不断演变的对话语境。我们分析了对话中的主题，以探索我们的混合系统如何塑造学习者的思考。我们的研究结果表明，嵌入LLM的对话支持了学习者对目标和活动进行更丰富的反思，但也由于提示的重复性和不一致性而引入了挑战，从而降低了参与度。

title: SynthRender and IRIS: Open-Source Framework and Dataset for Bidirectional Sim-Real Transfer in Industrial Object Perception
summary: Object perception is fundamental for tasks such as robotic material handling and quality inspection. However, modern supervised deep-learning perception models require large datasets for robust automation under semi-uncontrolled conditions. The cost of acquiring and annotating such data for proprietary parts is a major barrier for widespread deployment. In this context, we release SynthRender, an open source framework for synthetic image generation with Guided Domain Randomization capabilities. Furthermore, we benchmark recent Reality-to-Simulation techniques for 3D asset creation from 2D images of real parts. Combined with Domain Randomization, these synthetic assets provide low-overhead, transferable data even for parts lacking 3D files. We also introduce IRIS, the Industrial Real-Sim Imagery Set, containing 32 categories with diverse textures, intra-class variation, strong inter-class similarities and about 20,000 labels. Ablations on multiple benchmarks outline guidelines for efficient data generation with SynthRender. Our method surpasses existing approaches, achieving 99.1% mAP@50 on a public robotics dataset, 98.3% mAP@50 on an automotive benchmark, and 95.3% mAP@50 on IRIS.
tldr: The paper introduces SynthRender, an open-source framework for synthetic image generation, combined with Reality-to-Simulation techniques and a new dataset, IRIS, for object perception in industrial settings demonstrating significant improvements over existing approaches.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SynthRender，一个用于合成图像生成的开源框架，结合了现实到模拟的技术和一个名为IRIS的新数据集，用于工业环境中的物体感知，并展示了相对于现有方法的显著改进。
summary_zh: 目标感知是机器人材料处理和质量检测等任务的基础。然而，现代监督式深度学习感知模型需要在半受控条件下进行鲁棒自动化，因此需要大型数据集。获取和标注专有部件数据的成本是广泛部署的主要障碍。在此背景下，我们发布了SynthRender，这是一个开源框架，用于生成具有引导式域随机化功能的合成图像。此外，我们对最近的真实到仿真（Reality-to-Simulation）技术进行了基准测试，该技术可以从真实部件的2D图像创建3D资产。结合域随机化，这些合成资产即使对于缺少3D文件的部件，也能提供低开销、可迁移的数据。我们还介绍了IRIS，工业真实-仿真图像集，包含32个类别，具有多样的纹理、类内差异、强烈的类间相似性以及约20,000个标签。在多个基准上的消融实验概述了使用SynthRender进行高效数据生成的指南。我们的方法超越了现有方法，在公开机器人数据集上实现了99.1%的mAP@50，在汽车基准上实现了98.3%的mAP@50，在IRIS上实现了95.3%的mAP@50。

title: TextPecker: Rewarding Structural Anomaly Quantification for Enhancing Visual Text Rendering
summary: Visual Text Rendering (VTR) remains a critical challenge in text-to-image generation, where even advanced models frequently produce text with structural anomalies such as distortion, blurriness, and misalignment. However, we find that leading MLLMs and specialist OCR models largely fail to perceive these structural anomalies, creating a critical bottleneck for both VTR evaluation and RL-based optimization. As a result, even state-of-the-art generators (e.g., SeedDream4.0, Qwen-Image) still struggle to render structurally faithful text. To address this, we propose TextPecker, a plug-and-play structural anomaly perceptive RL strategy that mitigates noisy reward signals and works with any textto-image generator. To enable this capability, we construct a recognition dataset with character-level structural-anomaly annotations and develop a stroke-editing synthesis engine to expand structural-error coverage. Experiments show that TextPecker consistently improves diverse text-to-image models; even on the well-optimized Qwen-Image, it significantly yields average gains of 4% in structural fidelity and 8.7% in semantic alignment for Chinese text rendering, establishing a new state-of-the-art in high-fidelity VTR. Our work fills a gap in VTR optimization, providing a foundational step towards reliable and structural faithful visual text generation.
tldr: The paper introduces TextPecker, a reinforcement learning strategy with a structural anomaly perceptive reward, designed to improve visual text rendering (VTR) in text-to-image generation, addressing the limitations of current models in perceiving and correcting structural anomalies in generated text.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 TextPecker，一种具有结构异常感知奖励的强化学习策略，旨在改进文本到图像生成中的视觉文本渲染 (VTR)，解决了当前模型在感知和纠正生成文本中的结构异常方面的局限性。
summary_zh: 视觉文本渲染 (VTR) 仍然是文本到图像生成中的一个关键挑战，即使是先进的模型也经常生成具有结构异常（如变形、模糊和错位）的文本。然而，我们发现领先的MLLM和大宗商品OCR模型在很大程度上无法感知这些结构异常，这为VTR评估和基于强化学习的优化造成了关键瓶颈。因此，即使是最先进的生成器（例如，SeedDream4.0、Qwen-Image）仍然难以渲染结构上忠实的文本。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了TextPecker，一种即插即用的结构异常感知强化学习策略，它可以缓解噪声奖励信号，并与任何文本到图像生成器协同工作。为了实现这一能力，我们构建了一个具有字符级结构异常注释的识别数据集，并开发了一个笔画编辑合成引擎，以扩大结构错误覆盖范围。实验表明，TextPecker可以持续改进各种文本到图像模型；即使在经过良好优化的 Qwen-Image 上，它也能显著提高中文文本渲染的结构保真度平均 4%，语义对齐平均 8.7%，从而在高质量 VTR 领域建立了新的最先进水平。我们的工作填补了 VTR 优化中的空白，为可靠和结构忠实的视觉文本生成提供了一个基础步骤。

title: VAGNet: Grounding 3D Affordance from Human-Object Interactions in Videos
summary: 3D object affordance grounding aims to identify regions on 3D objects that support human-object interaction (HOI), a capability essential to embodied visual reasoning. However, most existing approaches rely on static visual or textual cues, neglecting that affordances are inherently defined by dynamic actions. As a result, they often struggle to localize the true contact regions involved in real interactions. We take a different perspective. Humans learn how to use objects by observing and imitating actions, not just by examining shapes. Motivated by this intuition, we introduce video-guided 3D affordance grounding, which leverages dynamic interaction sequences to provide functional supervision. To achieve this, we propose VAGNet, a framework that aligns video-derived interaction cues with 3D structure to resolve ambiguities that static cues cannot address. To support this new setting, we introduce PVAD, the first HOI video-3D pairing affordance dataset, providing functional supervision unavailable in prior works. Extensive experiments on PVAD show that VAGNet achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming static-based baselines. The code and dataset will be open publicly.
tldr: The paper introduces VAGNet, a video-guided 3D affordance grounding framework that leverages dynamic interaction sequences to identify object regions supporting human-object interaction, along with a new HOI video-3D pairing affordance dataset called PVAD.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种视频引导的3D可供性基准框架 VAGNet，它利用动态交互序列来识别支持人与物体交互的物体区域，并提出了一个新的HOI视频-3D配对可供性数据集 PVAD。
summary_zh: 三维物体可供性定位旨在识别三维物体上支持人-物交互（HOI）的区域，这是具身视觉推理的一项关键能力。 然而，现有的大多数方法依赖于静态的视觉或文本线索，忽略了可供性本质上是由动态动作定义的。 因此，它们经常难以定位实际交互中涉及的真实接触区域。 我们的视角有所不同。 人们通过观察和模仿动作来学习如何使用物体，而不仅仅是通过检查形状。 受此直觉的启发，我们引入了视频引导的三维可供性定位，它利用动态交互序列来提供功能性监督。 为了实现这一点，我们提出了VAGNet，一个将视频导出的交互线索与三维结构对齐的框架，以解决静态线索无法解决的模糊性。 为了支持这种新设置，我们引入了PVAD，这是第一个HOI视频-三维配对的可供性数据集，提供了先前工作中无法获得的功能性监督。 在PVAD上进行的大量实验表明，VAGNet实现了最先进的性能，显著优于基于静态的基线方法。 代码和数据集将公开。

title: Interaction-aware Representation Modeling with Co-occurrence Consistency for Egocentric Hand-Object Parsing
summary: A fine-grained understanding of egocentric human-environment interactions is crucial for developing next-generation embodied agents. One fundamental challenge in this area involves accurately parsing hands and active objects. While transformer-based architectures have demonstrated considerable potential for such tasks, several key limitations remain unaddressed: 1) existing query initialization mechanisms rely primarily on semantic cues or learnable parameters, demonstrating limited adaptability to changing active objects across varying input scenes; 2) previous transformer-based methods utilize pixel-level semantic features to iteratively refine queries during mask generation, which may introduce interaction-irrelevant content into the final embeddings; and 3) prevailing models are susceptible to "interaction illusion", producing physically inconsistent predictions. To address these issues, we propose an end-to-end Interaction-aware Transformer (InterFormer), which integrates three key components, i.e., a Dynamic Query Generator (DQG), a Dual-context Feature Selector (DFS), and the Conditional Co-occurrence (CoCo) loss. The DQG explicitly grounds query initialization in the spatial dynamics of hand-object contact, enabling targeted generation of interaction-aware queries for hands and various active objects. The DFS fuses coarse interactive cues with semantic features, thereby suppressing interaction-irrelevant noise and emphasizing the learning of interactive relationships. The CoCo loss incorporates hand-object relationship constraints to enhance physical consistency in prediction. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the EgoHOS and the challenging out-of-distribution mini-HOI4D datasets, demonstrating its effectiveness and strong generalization ability. Code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/yuggiehk/InterFormer.
tldr: The paper introduces InterFormer, a novel transformer-based architecture for egocentric hand-object parsing that addresses limitations of existing methods by incorporating interaction-aware query generation, feature selection, and co-occurrence consistency, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了InterFormer，一种用于以自我为中心的手-物体解析的新型基于Transformer的架构，通过结合交互感知查询生成、特征选择和共现一致性来解决现有方法的局限性，实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 对以自我中心视角的人与环境交互进行细粒度理解，对于开发下一代具身智能体至关重要。该领域的一个根本性挑战涉及准确地解析手部和活动物体。虽然基于Transformer的架构已经展示了在此类任务中的巨大潜力，但仍有一些关键的局限性尚未解决：1) 现有的查询初始化机制主要依赖于语义线索或可学习的参数，在不同输入场景下对变化的活动物体的适应性有限；2) 以往基于Transformer的方法利用像素级语义特征来迭代地细化掩码生成期间的查询，这可能会将与交互无关的内容引入最终的嵌入中；3) 现有的模型容易出现“交互幻觉”，产生物理上不一致的预测。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种端到端的交互感知Transformer (InterFormer)，它集成了三个关键组件，即动态查询生成器 (DQG)、双上下文特征选择器 (DFS) 和条件共现 (CoCo) 损失。DQG显式地将查询初始化建立在手-物接触的空间动态之上，从而能够有针对性地为手部和各种活动物体生成交互感知的查询。DFS将粗略的交互线索与语义特征融合，从而抑制与交互无关的噪声，并强调交互关系的学习。CoCo损失结合了手-物关系约束，以增强预测中的物理一致性。我们的模型在EgoHOS和具有挑战性的out-of-distribution mini-HOI4D数据集上都取得了最先进的性能，证明了其有效性和强大的泛化能力。代码和模型已在 https://github.com/yuggiehk/InterFormer 上公开。

title: CAD-Prompted SAM3: Geometry-Conditioned Instance Segmentation for Industrial Objects
summary: Verbal-prompted segmentation is inherently limited by the expressiveness of natural language and struggles with uncommon, instance-specific, or difficult-to-describe objects: scenarios frequently encountered in manufacturing and 3D printing environments. While image exemplars provide an alternative, they primarily encode appearance cues such as color and texture, which are often unrelated to a part's geometric identity. In industrial settings, a single component may be produced in different materials, finishes, or colors, making appearance-based prompting unreliable. In contrast, such objects are typically defined by precise CAD models that capture their canonical geometry. We propose a CAD-prompted segmentation framework built on SAM3 that uses canonical multi-view renderings of a CAD model as prompt input. The rendered views provide geometry-based conditioning independent of surface appearance. The model is trained using synthetic data generated from mesh renderings in simulation under diverse viewpoints and scene contexts. Our approach enables single-stage, CAD-prompted mask prediction, extending promptable segmentation to objects that cannot be robustly described by language or appearance alone.
tldr: The paper introduces a CAD-prompted segmentation framework (CAD-Prompted SAM3) for industrial objects using multi-view renderings of CAD models as prompts, addressing limitations of language and appearance-based segmentation in manufacturing environments. It leverages synthetic training data to enable CAD-conditioned instance segmentation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种CAD提示的分割框架 (CAD-Prompted SAM3)，它使用CAD模型的多视图渲染作为提示，解决了制造环境中基于语言和外观的分割的局限性。它利用合成训练数据来实现CAD条件下的实例分割。
summary_zh: 口头提示分割方法本质上受限于自然语言的表达能力，并且在不常见、特定于实例或难以描述的对象上表现欠佳：这些情景在制造业和 3D 打印环境中经常遇到。虽然图像范例提供了一种替代方案，但它们主要编码颜色和纹理等外观线索，而这些线索通常与零件的几何标识无关。在工业环境中，单个组件可能以不同的材料、饰面或颜色生产，使得基于外观的提示不可靠。相比之下，此类对象通常由捕获其规范几何形状的精确 CAD 模型定义。我们提出了一种基于 SAM3 构建的 CAD 提示分割框架，该框架使用 CAD 模型的规范多视图渲染图作为提示输入。渲染视图提供了独立于表面外观的基于几何形状的条件。该模型使用在模拟中从网格渲染生成的合成数据进行训练，这些数据来自不同的视点和场景上下文。我们的方法实现了单阶段的、CAD 提示的掩码预测，将可提示的分割扩展到无法仅通过语言或外观稳健描述的对象。

title: Beyond Human Performance: A Vision-Language Multi-Agent Approach for Quality Control in Pharmaceutical Manufacturing
summary: Colony-forming unit (CFU) detection is critical in pharmaceutical manufacturing, serving as a key component of Environmental Monitoring programs and ensuring compliance with stringent quality standards. Manual counting is labor-intensive and error-prone, while deep learning (DL) approaches, though accurate, remain vulnerable to sample quality variations and artifacts. Building on our earlier CNN-based framework (Beznik et al., 2020), we evaluated YOLOv5, YOLOv7, and YOLOv8 for CFU detection; however, these achieved only 97.08 percent accuracy, insufficient for pharmaceutical-grade requirements. A custom Detectron2 model trained on GSK's dataset of over 50,000 Petri dish images achieved 99 percent detection rate with 2 percent false positives and 0.6 percent false negatives. Despite high validation accuracy, Detectron2 performance degrades on outlier cases including contaminated plates, plastic artifacts, or poor optical clarity. To address this, we developed a multi-agent framework combining DL with vision-language models (VLMs). The VLM agent first classifies plates as valid or invalid. For valid samples, both DL and VLM agents independently estimate colony counts. When predictions align within 5 percent, results are automatically recorded in Postgres and SAP; otherwise, samples are routed for expert review. Expert feedback enables continuous retraining and self-improvement. Initial DL-based automation reduced human verification by 50 percent across vaccine manufacturing sites. With VLM integration, this increased to 85 percent, delivering significant operational savings. The proposed system provides a scalable, auditable, and regulation-ready solution for microbiological quality control, advancing automation in biopharmaceutical production.
tldr: This paper introduces a vision-language multi-agent system for colony-forming unit (CFU) detection in pharmaceutical manufacturing, combining deep learning and vision-language models to improve accuracy and reduce human verification, achieving an 85% automation rate.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于药物生产中菌落形成单位 (CFU) 检测的视觉语言多智能体系统，该系统结合了深度学习和视觉语言模型，以提高准确性并减少人工验证，实现了 85% 的自动化率。
summary_zh: 菌落形成单位(CFU)检测在制药生产中至关重要，是环境监测计划的关键组成部分，并用于确保符合严格的质量标准。人工计数劳动密集且容易出错，而深度学习(DL)方法虽然准确，但仍容易受到样品质量变化和伪影的影响。在我们早期基于CNN的框架 (Beznik et al., 2020) 的基础上，我们评估了YOLOv5、YOLOv7和YOLOv8用于CFU检测；然而，这些模型仅达到97.08%的准确率，不足以满足制药级要求。一个基于GSK超过50,000张培养皿图像数据集训练的定制Detectron2模型实现了99%的检测率，其中假阳性率为2%，假阴性率为0.6%。尽管验证准确率很高，但Detectron2的性能在异常情况下会降低，例如污染的培养皿、塑料伪影或较差的光学清晰度。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一个结合DL与视觉-语言模型(VLMs)的多智能体框架。VLM智能体首先将培养皿分类为有效或无效。对于有效的样品，DL和VLM智能体独立估计菌落计数。当预测结果在5%以内吻合时，结果自动记录在Postgres和SAP中；否则，样本将被路由以供专家审核。专家反馈能够实现持续的重新训练和自我完善。最初基于DL的自动化在疫苗生产基地减少了50%的人工验证。通过VLM集成，这一比例提高到85%，从而实现了显著的运营节省。所提出的系统为微生物质量控制提供了一个可扩展、可审计且符合法规要求的解决方案，从而推进了生物制药生产的自动化。

title: 3DSPA: A 3D Semantic Point Autoencoder for Evaluating Video Realism
summary: AI video generation is evolving rapidly. For video generators to be useful for applications ranging from robotics to film-making, they must consistently produce realistic videos. However, evaluating the realism of generated videos remains a largely manual process -- requiring human annotation or bespoke evaluation datasets which have restricted scope. Here we develop an automated evaluation framework for video realism which captures both semantics and coherent 3D structure and which does not require access to a reference video. Our method, 3DSPA, is a 3D spatiotemporal point autoencoder which integrates 3D point trajectories, depth cues, and DINO semantic features into a unified representation for video evaluation. 3DSPA models how objects move and what is happening in the scene, enabling robust assessments of realism, temporal consistency, and physical plausibility. Experiments show that 3DSPA reliably identifies videos which violate physical laws, is more sensitive to motion artifacts, and aligns more closely with human judgments of video quality and realism across multiple datasets. Our results demonstrate that enriching trajectory-based representations with 3D semantics offers a stronger foundation for benchmarking generative video models, and implicitly captures physical rule violations. The code and pretrained model weights will be available at https://github.com/TheProParadox/3dspa_code.
tldr: The paper proposes 3DSPA, a 3D semantic point autoencoder that evaluates video realism by integrating 3D point trajectories, depth cues, and semantic features, offering an automated alternative to manual video quality assessment.
tldr_zh: 本文提出3DSPA，一个3D语义点自编码器，通过整合3D点轨迹、深度线索和语义特征来评估视频的真实感，为手动视频质量评估提供了一种自动化的替代方案。
summary_zh: 人工智能视频生成技术正在快速发展。为了使视频生成器能够应用于机器人或电影制作等领域，它们必须能够持续生成逼真的视频。然而，评估生成视频的真实感仍然主要依赖于手动过程——需要人工标注或范围受限的定制评估数据集。在此，我们开发了一种针对视频真实感的自动化评估框架，该框架能够捕捉语义和连贯的3D结构，且无需访问参考视频。我们的方法3DSPA是一个3D时空点自动编码器，它将3D点轨迹、深度线索和DINO语义特征整合到统一的视频评估表示中。3DSPA对物体的运动方式以及场景中正在发生的事情进行建模，从而能够对真实感、时间一致性和物理合理性进行稳健的评估。实验表明，3DSPA能够可靠地识别违反物理定律的视频，对运动伪影更敏感，并且在多个数据集上与人工对视频质量和真实感的判断更一致。我们的结果表明，用3D语义丰富基于轨迹的表示为生成视频模型的基准测试提供了更强大的基础，并且隐式地捕捉了物理规则违反。 代码和预训练模型权重将在https://github.com/TheProParadox/3dspa_code上提供。

title: Flow3r: Factored Flow Prediction for Scalable Visual Geometry Learning
summary: Current feed-forward 3D/4D reconstruction systems rely on dense geometry and pose supervision -- expensive to obtain at scale and particularly scarce for dynamic real-world scenes. We present Flow3r, a framework that augments visual geometry learning with dense 2D correspondences (`flow') as supervision, enabling scalable training from unlabeled monocular videos. Our key insight is that the flow prediction module should be factored: predicting flow between two images using geometry latents from one and pose latents from the other. This factorization directly guides the learning of both scene geometry and camera motion, and naturally extends to dynamic scenes. In controlled experiments, we show that factored flow prediction outperforms alternative designs and that performance scales consistently with unlabeled data. Integrating factored flow into existing visual geometry architectures and training with ${\sim}800$K unlabeled videos, Flow3r achieves state-of-the-art results across eight benchmarks spanning static and dynamic scenes, with its largest gains on in-the-wild dynamic videos where labeled data is most scarce.
tldr: Flow3r introduces a novel factored flow prediction framework that utilizes unlabeled monocular video data to learn scene geometry and camera motion, achieving state-of-the-art performance on several 3D/4D reconstruction benchmarks, especially in challenging dynamic scenes.
tldr_zh: Flow3r 引入了一种新型分解流预测框架，该框架利用未标记的单目视频数据来学习场景几何和相机运动，并在多个 3D/4D 重建基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，尤其是在具有挑战性的动态场景中。
summary_zh: 当前的feed-forward 3D/4D重建系统依赖于密集的几何和姿态监督，这在大规模场景下获取成本高昂，并且对于动态真实世界场景而言尤其稀缺。我们提出了Flow3r，一个通过密集2D对应关系（“光流”）作为监督增强视觉几何学习的框架，从而能够从无标签单目视频中进行可扩展的训练。我们的关键见解是：光流预测模块应被分解，即利用来自一幅图像的几何潜在变量和来自另一幅图像的姿态潜在变量来预测两幅图像之间的光流。这种分解直接引导场景几何和相机运动的学习，并自然地扩展到动态场景。在受控实验中，我们表明分解式光流预测优于其他设计，并且性能随着无标签数据规模的增加而持续提升。将分解式光流集成到现有的视觉几何架构中，并使用约80万个无标签视频进行训练，Flow3r在横跨静态和动态场景的八个基准测试中取得了最先进的结果，并且在标记数据最稀缺的真实世界动态视频上取得了最大的收益。

title: SOM-VQ: Topology-Aware Tokenization for Interactive Generative Models
summary: Vector-quantized representations enable powerful discrete generative models but lack semantic structure in token space, limiting interpretable human control. We introduce SOM-VQ, a tokenization method that combines vector quantization with Self-Organizing Maps to learn discrete codebooks with explicit low-dimensional topology. Unlike standard VQ-VAE, SOM-VQ uses topology-aware updates that preserve neighborhood structure: nearby tokens on a learned grid correspond to semantically similar states, enabling direct geometric manipulation of the latent space. We demonstrate that SOM-VQ produces more learnable token sequences in the evaluated domains while providing an explicit navigable geometry in code space. Critically, the topological organization enables intuitive human-in-the-loop control: users can steer generation by manipulating distances in token space, achieving semantic alignment without frame-level constraints. We focus on human motion generation - a domain where kinematic structure, smooth temporal continuity, and interactive use cases (choreography, rehabilitation, HCI) make topology-aware control especially natural - demonstrating controlled divergence and convergence from reference sequences through simple grid-based sampling. SOM-VQ provides a general framework for interpretable discrete representations applicable to music, gesture, and other interactive generative domains.
tldr: The paper introduces SOM-VQ, a novel tokenization method that combines vector quantization with Self-Organizing Maps to create discrete codebooks with explicit low-dimensional topology for interactive generative models, specifically human motion generation, enabling intuitive human control.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为SOM-VQ的新型标记化方法，该方法结合了向量量化和自组织映射，为交互式生成模型创建具有明确低维拓扑的离散码本，特别是人体运动生成，从而实现直观的人工控制。
summary_zh: 向量量化表示能够实现强大的离散生成模型，但由于在令牌空间中缺乏语义结构，从而限制了可解释的人工控制。我们引入了SOM-VQ，一种将向量量化与自组织映射相结合的令牌化方法，以学习具有显式低维拓扑结构的离散码本。与标准的VQ-VAE不同，SOM-VQ使用拓扑感知的更新来保留邻域结构：学习网格上相邻的令牌对应于语义上相似的状态，从而可以直接对潜在空间进行几何操作。实验表明，在评估的领域中，SOM-VQ产生更易于学习的令牌序列，并在代码空间中提供了显式的可导航几何结构。至关重要的是，拓扑组织实现了直观的人在环控制：用户可以通过操纵令牌空间中的距离来引导生成，从而实现语义对齐，而无需帧级别的约束。我们专注于人体运动生成——在该领域中，运动学结构、平滑的时间连续性和交互式用例（编舞、康复、人机交互）使得拓扑感知控制特别自然——通过简单的基于网格的采样，展示了相对于参考序列的可控发散和收敛。SOM-VQ为可解释的离散表示提供了一个通用框架，适用于音乐、手势和其他交互式生成领域。

title: Matching Multiple Experts: On the Exploitability of Multi-Agent Imitation Learning
summary: Multi-agent imitation learning (MA-IL) aims to learn optimal policies from expert demonstrations of interactions in multi-agent interactive domains. Despite existing guarantees on the performance of the resulting learned policies, characterizations of how far the learned polices are from a Nash equilibrium are missing for offline MA-IL. In this paper, we demonstrate impossibility and hardness results of learning low-exploitable policies in general $n$-player Markov Games. We do so by providing examples where even exact measure matching fails, and demonstrating a new hardness result on characterizing the Nash gap given a fixed measure matching error. We then show how these challenges can be overcome using strategic dominance assumptions on the expert equilibrium. Specifically, for the case of dominant strategy expert equilibria, assuming Behavioral Cloning error $ε_{\text{BC}}$, this provides a Nash imitation gap of $\mathcal{O}\left(nε_{\text{BC}}/(1-γ)^2\right)$ for a discount factor $γ$. We generalize this result with a new notion of best-response continuity, and argue that this is implicitly encouraged by standard regularization techniques.
tldr: This paper investigates the exploitability of multi-agent imitation learning policies, demonstrating hardness results on achieving low-exploitability and providing solutions under strategic dominance assumptions, ultimately deriving a Nash imitation gap bound.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了多智能体模仿学习策略的可利用性，展示了在实现低可利用性方面的难度结果，并在策略优势假设下提供了解决方案，最终推导出了纳什模仿差距的界限。
summary_zh: 多智能体模仿学习（MA-IL）旨在从多智能体交互领域专家示范的交互中学习最优策略。尽管现有研究已保证了学习策略的性能，但离线MA-IL中，对学习策略与纳什均衡的差距的刻画仍然缺失。在本文中，我们展示了在一般的$n$人马尔可夫博弈中学习低可利用策略的不可能性和难度结果。我们通过提供即使精确度量匹配也会失效的例子，并展示关于在给定固定度量匹配误差下刻画纳什缺口的新难度结果来实现这一目标。然后，我们展示了如何利用专家均衡的策略支配假设来克服这些挑战。具体来说，对于具有优势策略专家均衡的情况，假设行为克隆误差为$ε_{\text{BC}}$，则对于折扣因子$γ$，这可以提供$\mathcal{O}\left(nε_{\text{BC}}/(1-γ)^2\right)$的纳什模仿缺口。我们使用一种新的最佳响应连续性概念推广了这一结果，并论证了标准正则化技术隐式地鼓励这种连续性。

title: Probing Dec-POMDP Reasoning in Cooperative MARL
summary: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is typically framed as a decentralised partially observable Markov decision process (Dec-POMDP), a setting whose hardness stems from two key challenges: partial observability and decentralised coordination. Genuinely solving such tasks requires Dec-POMDP reasoning, where agents use history to infer hidden states and coordinate based on local information. Yet it remains unclear whether popular benchmarks actually demand this reasoning or permit success via simpler strategies.
