We introduce a diagnostic suite combining statistically grounded performance comparisons and information-theoretic probes to audit the behavioural complexity of baseline policies (IPPO and MAPPO) across 37 scenarios spanning MPE, SMAX, Overcooked, Hanabi, and MaBrax. Our diagnostics reveal that success on these benchmarks rarely requires genuine Dec-POMDP reasoning. Reactive policies match the performance of memory-based agents in over half the scenarios, and emergent coordination frequently relies on brittle, synchronous action coupling rather than robust temporal influence. These findings suggest that some widely used benchmarks may not adequately test core Dec-POMDP assumptions under current training paradigms, potentially leading to over-optimistic assessments of progress. We release our diagnostic tooling to support more rigorous environment design and evaluation in cooperative MARL.
tldr: This paper investigates whether common cooperative MARL benchmarks truly require Dec-POMDP reasoning and finds that often simpler, reactive strategies suffice, suggesting benchmarks may not adequately test core Dec-POMDP assumptions.
tldr_zh: 该论文研究了常用的协作多智能体强化学习基准是否真正需要Dec-POMDP推理，并发现通常简单的反应式策略就足够了，这表明基准可能没有充分测试核心Dec-POMDP假设。
summary_zh: 合作式多智能体强化学习（MARL）通常被构建为分散式部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（Dec-POMDP），这种设置的难度源于两个关键挑战：部分可观察性和分散式协调。真正解决此类任务需要Dec-POMDP推理，即智能体利用历史信息推断隐藏状态并根据本地信息进行协调。然而，尚不清楚流行的基准测试是否真正需要这种推理，或者是否允许通过更简单的策略获得成功。我们引入了一个诊断套件，结合了基于统计的性能比较和信息论探测，以审计37个场景（涵盖MPE、SMAX、Overcooked、Hanabi和MaBrax）中基线策略（IPPO和MAPPO）的行为复杂性。我们的诊断结果表明，在这些基准测试中获得成功极少需要真正的Dec-POMDP推理。在超过一半的场景中，反应式策略的性能与基于记忆的智能体相当，并且涌现出的协调经常依赖于脆弱的、同步的动作耦合，而不是稳健的时间影响。这些发现表明，在当前的训练范式下，一些被广泛使用的基准测试可能无法充分测试核心Dec-POMDP假设，从而可能导致对进展的过于乐观的评估。我们发布诊断工具，以支持合作式MARL中更严格的环境设计和评估。

title: Fuz-RL: A Fuzzy-Guided Robust Framework for Safe Reinforcement Learning under Uncertainty
summary: Safe Reinforcement Learning (RL) is crucial for achieving high performance while ensuring safety in real-world applications. However, the complex interplay of multiple uncertainty sources in real environments poses significant challenges for interpretable risk assessment and robust decision-making. To address these challenges, we propose Fuz-RL, a fuzzy measure-guided robust framework for safe RL. Specifically, our framework develops a novel fuzzy Bellman operator for estimating robust value functions using Choquet integrals. Theoretically, we prove that solving the Fuz-RL problem (in Constrained Markov Decision Process (CMDP) form) is equivalent to solving distributionally robust safe RL problems (in robust CMDP form), effectively avoiding min-max optimization. Empirical analyses on safe-control-gym and safety-gymnasium scenarios demonstrate that Fuz-RL effectively integrates with existing safe RL baselines in a model-free manner, significantly improving both safety and control performance under various types of uncertainties in observation, action, and dynamics.
tldr: The paper introduces Fuz-RL, a fuzzy measure-guided safe RL framework using Choquet integrals to handle uncertainty, showing improved safety and control performance in benchmark environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Fuz-RL，一个使用Choquet积分处理不确定性的模糊测度引导的安全强化学习框架，并在基准环境中展示了改进的安全性和控制性能。
summary_zh: 安全强化学习(RL)对于在真实世界应用中实现高性能并确保安全至关重要。然而，真实环境中多种不确定性来源之间的复杂相互作用为可解释的风险评估和稳健的决策制定带来了重大挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了Fuz-RL，一个模糊测度引导的稳健安全强化学习框架。具体而言，我们的框架开发了一种新颖的模糊贝尔曼算子，利用措奎积分来估计稳健的价值函数。理论上，我们证明了求解Fuz-RL问题（以约束马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）形式表示）等同于求解分布鲁棒的安全强化学习问题（以鲁棒CMDP形式表示），从而有效地避免了min-max优化。在safe-control-gym和safety-gymnasium场景中的实证分析表明，Fuz-RL能够以无模型的方式有效地与现有的安全强化学习基线集成，显著提高在观测、动作和动力学等多种类型不确定性下的安全性和控制性能。

title: Oracle-Robust Online Alignment for Large Language Models
summary: We study online alignment of large language models under misspecified preference feedback, where the observed preference oracle deviates from an ideal but unknown ground-truth oracle. The online LLM alignment problem is a bi-level reinforcement problem due to the coupling between data collection and policy updates. Recently, the problem has been reduced to tractable single-level objective in the SAIL (Self-Improving Efficient Online Alignment) framework. In this paper, we introduce a pointwise oracle uncertainty set in this problem and formulate an oracle-robust online alignment objective as a worst-case optimization problem. For log-linear policies, we show that this robust objective admits an exact closed-form decomposition into the original loss function plus an explicit sensitivity penalty. We develop projected stochastic composite updates for the resulting weakly convex objective and prove $\widetilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-2})$ oracle complexity for reaching approximate stationarity.
tldr: This paper presents a robust online alignment method for LLMs by addressing misspecified preference feedback using a pointwise oracle uncertainty set and achieving a closed-form solution with theoretical guarantees.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的在线LLM对齐方法，通过使用逐点预言机不确定性集来解决错误指定的偏好反馈，并实现了具有理论保证的闭式解。
summary_zh: 我们研究了在存在偏差偏好反馈下的大型语言模型在线对齐，其中观测到的偏好预言机偏离了理想但未知的真实预言机。由于数据收集和策略更新之间的耦合关系，在线LLM对齐问题是一个双层强化学习问题。最近，这个问题在SAIL（自改进高效在线对齐）框架中被简化为可处理的单层目标。在本文中，我们在此问题中引入了一个逐点预言机不确定性集合，并将预言机鲁棒在线对齐目标构建为一个最坏情况优化问题。对于对数线性策略，我们证明了这种鲁棒目标能够精确地分解为原始损失函数加上一个显式的敏感度惩罚项。我们为所得的弱凸目标开发了投影随机复合更新，并证明了达到近似平稳状态的预言机复杂度为$\widetilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-2})$。

title: $κ$-Explorer: A Unified Framework for Active Model Estimation in MDPs
summary: In tabular Markov decision processes (MDPs) with perfect state observability, each trajectory provides active samples from the transition distributions conditioned on state-action pairs. Consequently, accurate model estimation depends on how the exploration policy allocates visitation frequencies in accordance with the intrinsic complexity of each transition distribution. Building on recent work on coverage-based exploration, we introduce a parameterized family of decomposable and concave objective functions $U_κ$ that explicitly incorporate both intrinsic estimation complexity and extrinsic visitation frequency. Moreover, the curvature $κ$ provides a unified treatment of various global objectives, such as the average-case and worst-case estimation error objectives. Using the closed-form characterization of the gradient of $U_κ$, we propose $κ$-Explorer, an active exploration algorithm that performs Frank-Wolfe-style optimization over state-action occupancy measures. The diminishing-returns structure of $U_κ$ naturally prioritizes underexplored and high-variance transitions, while preserving smoothness properties that enable efficient optimization. We establish tight regret guarantees for $κ$-Explorer and further introduce a fully online and computationally efficient surrogate algorithm for practical use. Experiments on benchmark MDPs demonstrate that $κ$-Explorer provides superior performance compared to existing exploration strategies.
tldr: The paper introduces κ-Explorer, an active exploration algorithm for MDPs that balances exploration and exploitation by optimizing a parameterized objective function considering both visitation frequency and estimation complexity, achieving superior performance compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 κ-Explorer，一种用于 MDP 的主动探索算法，通过优化一个参数化的目标函数，考虑了访问频率和估计复杂性，从而平衡了探索和利用，并实现了优于现有方法的性能。
summary_zh: 在具有完美状态可观测性的表格型马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 中，每条轨迹都提供了状态-动作对条件下状态转移分布的主动样本。因此，精确的模型估计取决于探索策略如何根据每个状态转移分布的内在复杂性分配访问频率。基于最近在基于覆盖率的探索方面的工作，我们引入了一个参数化的、可分解且凹的目标函数族 $U_κ$，其明确地结合了内在估计复杂性和外在访问频率。此外，曲率 $κ$ 提供了对各种全局目标（例如平均情况和最坏情况估计误差目标）的统一处理。利用 $U_κ$ 梯度的闭式特征，我们提出了 $κ$-Explorer，一种在状态-动作占用测度上执行 Frank-Wolfe 式优化的主动探索算法。 $U_κ$ 递减回报的结构自然地优先考虑未充分探索和高方差的状态转移，同时保留了实现有效优化的平滑属性。我们为 $κ$-Explorer 建立了严格的遗憾保证，并进一步介绍了一种完全在线且计算高效的替代算法，供实际使用。在基准 MDP 上的实验表明，与现有的探索策略相比，$κ$-Explorer 提供了卓越的性能。

title: GeoPT: Scaling Physics Simulation via Lifted Geometric Pre-Training
summary: Neural simulators promise efficient surrogates for physics simulation, but scaling them is bottlenecked by the prohibitive cost of generating high-fidelity training data. Pre-training on abundant off-the-shelf geometries offers a natural alternative, yet faces a fundamental gap: supervision on static geometry alone ignores dynamics and can lead to negative transfer on physics tasks. We present GeoPT, a unified pre-trained model for general physics simulation based on lifted geometric pre-training. The core idea is to augment geometry with synthetic dynamics, enabling dynamics-aware self-supervision without physics labels. Pre-trained on over one million samples, GeoPT consistently improves industrial-fidelity benchmarks spanning fluid mechanics for cars, aircraft, and ships, and solid mechanics in crash simulation, reducing labeled data requirements by 20-60% and accelerating convergence by 2$\times$. These results show that lifting with synthetic dynamics bridges the geometry-physics gap, unlocking a scalable path for neural simulation and potentially beyond. Code is available at https://github.com/Physics-Scaling/GeoPT.
tldr: GeoPT pre-trains neural simulators on geometric data augmented with synthetic dynamics, improving performance and data efficiency on industrial physics simulation benchmarks.
tldr_zh: GeoPT通过使用合成动力学增强的几何数据对神经模拟器进行预训练，从而提高了工业物理模拟基准的性能和数据效率。
summary_zh: 神经模拟器有望成为高效的物理模拟替代方案，但其扩展受到生成高保真训练数据的高昂成本的制约。在丰富的现成几何形状上进行预训练提供了一种自然的替代方案，但面临着一个根本差距：仅基于静态几何形状的监督忽略了动力学，并可能导致物理任务上的负迁移。我们提出了GeoPT，一种基于提升几何预训练的通用物理模拟的统一预训练模型。核心思想是用合成动力学来增强几何形状，从而实现无需物理标签的动力学感知自监督。GeoPT在超过一百万个样本上进行了预训练，持续改进了涵盖汽车、飞机和船舶流体力学以及碰撞模拟中固体力学的工业级基准测试，将标记数据需求降低了20-60%，并加速收敛2倍。这些结果表明，通过合成动力学进行提升弥合了几何学与物理学之间的差距，为神经模拟乃至更广泛的应用解锁了一条可扩展的路径。代码可在https://github.com/Physics-Scaling/GeoPT获取。

title: Gap-Dependent Bounds for Nearly Minimax Optimal Reinforcement Learning with Linear Function Approximation
summary: We study gap-dependent performance guarantees for nearly minimax-optimal algorithms in reinforcement learning with linear function approximation. While prior works have established gap-dependent regret bounds in this setting, existing analyses do not apply to algorithms that achieve the nearly minimax-optimal worst-case regret bound $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{H^3K})$, where $d$ is the feature dimension, $H$ is the horizon length, and $K$ is the number of episodes. We bridge this gap by providing the first gap-dependent regret bound for the nearly minimax-optimal algorithm LSVI-UCB++ (He et al., 2023). Our analysis yields improved dependencies on both $d$ and $H$ compared to previous gap-dependent results. Moreover, leveraging the low policy-switching property of LSVI-UCB++, we introduce a concurrent variant that enables efficient parallel exploration across multiple agents and establish the first gap-dependent sample complexity upper bound for online multi-agent RL with linear function approximation, achieving linear speedup with respect to the number of agents.
tldr: This paper presents a gap-dependent regret bound for the LSVI-UCB++ algorithm in reinforcement learning with linear function approximation, improving upon prior results and extending it to a multi-agent setting with a linear speedup.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了线性函数逼近强化学习中 LSVI-UCB++ 算法的 gap-dependent regret bound，改进了先前的结果，并将其扩展到多智能体设置，实现了线性加速。
summary_zh: 我们研究了线性函数近似强化学习中，对于近似最小最大最优算法而言，其性能保证与差距的依赖关系。虽然先前的研究已在该设定下建立了与差距相关的遗憾界，但现有分析并不适用于实现近似最小最大最优最坏情况遗憾界 $\tilde{O}(d\sqrt{H^3K})$ 的算法，其中 $d$ 是特征维度，$H$ 是视界长度，$K$ 是幕数。我们通过为近似最小最大最优算法 LSVI-UCB++ (He et al., 2023) 提供第一个与差距相关的遗憾界来弥合这一差距。与先前与差距相关的结果相比，我们的分析产生了在 $d$ 和 $H$ 上的改进依赖。此外，利用 LSVI-UCB++ 的低策略切换特性，我们引入了一种并发变体，可以实现跨多个智能体的有效并行探索，并为具有线性函数近似的在线多智能体强化学习建立第一个与差距相关的样本复杂度上界，实现了相对于智能体数量的线性加速。

title: Event-Aided Sharp Radiance Field Reconstruction for Fast-Flying Drones
summary: Fast-flying aerial robots promise rapid inspection under limited battery constraints, with direct applications in infrastructure inspection, terrain exploration, and search and rescue. However, high speeds lead to severe motion blur in images and induce significant drift and noise in pose estimates, making dense 3D reconstruction with Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) particularly challenging due to their high sensitivity to such degradations. In this work, we present a unified framework that leverages asynchronous event streams alongside motion-blurred frames to reconstruct high-fidelity radiance fields from agile drone flights. By embedding event-image fusion into NeRF optimization and jointly refining event-based visual-inertial odometry priors using both event and frame modalities, our method recovers sharp radiance fields and accurate camera trajectories without ground-truth supervision. We validate our approach on both synthetic data and real-world sequences captured by a fast-flying drone. Despite highly dynamic drone flights, where RGB frames are severely degraded by motion blur and pose priors become unreliable, our method reconstructs high-fidelity radiance fields and preserves fine scene details, delivering a performance gain of over 50% on real-world data compared to state-of-the-art methods.
tldr: This paper presents a novel method for reconstructing high-fidelity NeRFs from fast-flying drone footage by fusing asynchronous event streams with motion-blurred images and jointly optimizing event-based visual-inertial odometry priors, achieving significant performance gains over existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新颖的方法，通过融合异步事件流和运动模糊图像，并联合优化基于事件的视觉惯性里程计先验，从快速飞行的无人机镜头中重建高保真度的NeRFs，与现有方法相比，性能得到了显著提高。
summary_zh: 快速飞行的空中机器人有望在有限的电池约束下实现快速巡检，在基础设施检测、地形探索以及搜索和救援方面具有直接应用。然而，高速度会导致图像中严重的运动模糊，并在位姿估计中引入显著的漂移和噪声，由于神经辐射场（NeRFs）对此类退化的高度敏感，使得使用NeRFs进行密集3D重建变得尤其具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，该框架利用异步事件流和运动模糊帧，从敏捷无人机飞行中重建高保真度的辐射场。通过将事件-图像融合嵌入到NeRF优化中，并利用事件和帧模态联合优化基于事件的视觉惯性里程计先验，我们的方法可以在没有ground-truth监督的情况下恢复清晰的辐射场和准确的相机轨迹。我们在合成数据和快速飞行无人机捕获的真实序列上验证了我们的方法。尽管存在高度动态的无人机飞行，其中RGB帧受到运动模糊的严重退化，且位姿先验变得不可靠，我们的方法依然可以重建高保真度的辐射场并保留精细的场景细节，与最先进的方法相比，在真实世界数据上实现了超过50%的性能提升。

title: A Robotic Testing Platform for Pipelined Discovery of Resilient Soft Actuators
summary: Short lifetime under high electrical fields hinders the widespread robotic application of linear dielectric elastomer actuators (DEAs). Systematic scanning is difficult due to time-consuming per-sample testing and the high-dimensional parameter space affecting performance. To address this, we propose an optimization pipeline enabled by a novel testing robot capable of scanning DEA lifetime. The robot integrates electro-mechanical property measurement, programmable voltage input, and multi-channel testing capacity. Using it, we scanned the lifetime of Elastosil-based linear actuators across parameters including input voltage magnitude, frequency, electrode material concentration, and electrical connection filler. The optimal parameter combinations improved operational lifetime under boundary operating conditions by up to 100% and were subsequently scaled up to achieve higher force and displacement output. The final product demonstrated resilience on a modular, scalable quadruped walking robot with payload carrying capacity (>100% of its untethered body weight, and >700% of combined actuator weight). This work is the first to introduce a self-driving lab approach into robotic actuator design.
tldr: This paper presents a robotic testing platform for optimizing the lifetime and performance of dielectric elastomer actuators (DEAs), demonstrating significant improvements in actuator resilience and application on a quadruped robot.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个机器人测试平台，用于优化介电弹性体执行器（DEA）的寿命和性能，并证明了执行器在四足机器人上的弹性和应用方面的显著改进。
summary_zh: 在线性介电弹性体驱动器(DEA)在高电场下的短寿命阻碍了其在机器人领域的广泛应用。由于耗时的单样品测试以及影响性能的高维参数空间，系统性扫描变得困难。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个由新型DEA寿命扫描测试机器人驱动的优化流程。该机器人集成了机电性能测量、可编程电压输入和多通道测试能力。利用该机器人，我们扫描了基于Elastosil的线性驱动器的寿命，涵盖了包括输入电压幅度、频率、电极材料浓度和电气连接填充剂在内的参数。最佳参数组合在边界操作条件下将运行寿命提高了高达100%，并随后进行了放大以实现更高的力和位移输出。最终产品在模块化、可扩展的四足步行机器人上展示了强大的性能，其有效载荷能力（>自身无系绳重量的100％，和>组合驱动器重量的700％）。这项工作首次将自动驾驶实验室方法引入机器人驱动器设计中。

title: ParkDiffusion++: Ego Intention Conditioned Joint Multi-Agent Trajectory Prediction for Automated Parking using Diffusion Models
summary: Automated parking is a challenging operational domain for advanced driver assistance systems, requiring robust scene understanding and interaction reasoning. The key challenge is twofold: (i) predict multiple plausible ego intentions according to context and (ii) for each intention, predict the joint responses of surrounding agents, enabling effective what-if decision-making. However, existing methods often fall short, typically treating these interdependent problems in isolation. We propose ParkDiffusion++, which jointly learns a multi-modal ego intention predictor and an ego-conditioned multi-agent joint trajectory predictor for automated parking. Our approach makes several key contributions. First, we introduce an ego intention tokenizer that predicts a small set of discrete endpoint intentions from agent histories and vectorized map polylines. Second, we perform ego-intention-conditioned joint prediction, yielding socially consistent predictions of the surrounding agents for each possible ego intention. Third, we employ a lightweight safety-guided denoiser with different constraints to refine joint scenes during training, thus improving accuracy and safety. Fourth, we propose counterfactual knowledge distillation, where an EMA teacher refined by a frozen safety-guided denoiser provides pseudo-targets that capture how agents react to alternative ego intentions. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that ParkDiffusion++ achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Dragon Lake Parking (DLP) dataset and the Intersections Drone (inD) dataset. Importantly, qualitative what-if visualizations show that other agents react appropriately to different ego intentions.
tldr: ParkDiffusion++ introduces a diffusion-based model for joint multi-agent trajectory prediction in automated parking, conditioned on ego-vehicle intentions, achieving state-of-the-art results on standard datasets by incorporating safety guidance and counterfactual knowledge distillation.
tldr_zh: ParkDiffusion++提出了一种基于扩散模型的联合多智能体轨迹预测方法，用于自动泊车，该方法以自我车辆的意图为条件，通过结合安全指导和反事实知识蒸馏，在标准数据集上实现了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 自动泊车是高级驾驶辅助系统一个具有挑战性的操作领域，需要强大的场景理解和交互推理能力。其主要挑战体现在两个方面：（i）根据上下文预测多个合理的主车意图；（ii）针对每个意图，预测周围车辆的联合反应，从而实现有效的假设情景决策。 然而，现有方法通常表现不足，通常孤立地处理这些相互依赖的问题。我们提出了ParkDiffusion++，它联合学习一个多模态主车意图预测器和一个以主车意图为条件的的周围车辆联合轨迹预测器，用于自动泊车。 我们的方法做出了若干关键贡献。 首先，我们引入了一种主车意图标记器，它从车辆历史和矢量化地图折线预测一组离散的终点意图。 其次，我们执行以主车意图为条件的联合预测，为每个可能的主车意图产生具有社会一致性的周围车辆预测结果。 第三，我们采用轻量级的安全引导去噪器，用不同的约束来细化训练期间的联合场景，从而提高准确性和安全性。 第四，我们提出了反事实知识蒸馏，其中由冻结的安全引导去噪器细化的EMA教师提供伪目标，捕获其他车辆如何对替代的主车意图做出反应。大量评估表明，ParkDiffusion++在Dragon Lake Parking（DLP）数据集和Intersections Drone（inD）数据集上实现了最先进的性能。 重要的是，定性的假设情景可视化表明，其他车辆能够对不同的主车意图做出适当的反应。

title: RU4D-SLAM: Reweighting Uncertainty in Gaussian Splatting SLAM for 4D Scene Reconstruction
summary: Combining 3D Gaussian splatting with Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) has gained popularity as it enables continuous 3D environment reconstruction during motion. However, existing methods struggle in dynamic environments, particularly moving objects complicate 3D reconstruction and, in turn, hinder reliable tracking. The emergence of 4D reconstruction, especially 4D Gaussian splatting, offers a promising direction for addressing these challenges, yet its potential for 4D-aware SLAM remains largely underexplored. Along this direction, we propose a robust and efficient framework, namely Reweighting Uncertainty in Gaussian Splatting SLAM (RU4D-SLAM) for 4D scene reconstruction, that introduces temporal factors into spatial 3D representation while incorporating uncertainty-aware perception of scene changes, blurred image synthesis, and dynamic scene reconstruction. We enhance dynamic scene representation by integrating motion blur rendering, and improve uncertainty-aware tracking by extending per-pixel uncertainty modeling, which is originally designed for static scenarios, to handle blurred images. Furthermore, we propose a semantic-guided reweighting mechanism for per-pixel uncertainty estimation in dynamic scenes, and introduce a learnable opacity weight to support adaptive 4D mapping. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both trajectory accuracy and 4D scene reconstruction, particularly in dynamic environments with moving objects and low-quality inputs. Code available: https://ru4d-slam.github.io
tldr: RU4D-SLAM introduces a new SLAM framework that combines 4D Gaussian Splatting with uncertainty-aware perception to achieve robust and efficient 4D scene reconstruction, particularly in dynamic environments, outperforming existing methods.
tldr_zh: RU4D-SLAM 提出了一种新的 SLAM 框架，它结合了 4D 高斯溅射和不确定性感知，以实现稳健高效的 4D 场景重建，尤其是在动态环境中，性能优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 将3D高斯溅射与同步定位与地图构建（SLAM）相结合的方法因其能在运动过程中实现连续的3D环境重建而日益流行。然而，现有方法在动态环境中表现欠佳，特别是移动物体会使3D重建复杂化，进而阻碍可靠的跟踪。4D重建技术的出现，尤其是4D高斯溅射，为解决这些挑战提供了一个有希望的方向，但其在4D感知SLAM方面的潜力在很大程度上仍未被探索。沿着这个方向，我们提出了一个鲁棒且高效的框架，即高斯溅射SLAM中的不确定性重加权框架（RU4D-SLAM），用于4D场景重建，该框架在空间3D表示中引入了时间因素，同时集成了对场景变化的感知（感知其不确定性）、模糊图像合成以及动态场景重建。我们通过整合运动模糊渲染来增强动态场景表示，并通过扩展最初为静态场景设计的逐像素不确定性建模，以处理模糊图像，从而提高不确定性感知跟踪的能力。此外，我们提出了一种语义引导的重加权机制，用于动态场景中逐像素不确定性估计，并引入一个可学习的不透明度权重来支持自适应的4D地图构建。在标准基准数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法在轨迹精度和4D场景重建方面都显著优于最先进的方法，尤其是在具有移动物体和低质量输入的动态环境中。代码地址：https://ru4d-slam.github.io

title: Robot Local Planner: A Periodic Sampling-Based Motion Planner with Minimal Waypoints for Home Environments
summary: The objective of this study is to enable fast and safe manipulation tasks in home environments. Specifically, we aim to develop a system that can recognize its surroundings and identify target objects while in motion, enabling it to plan and execute actions accordingly. We propose a periodic sampling-based whole-body trajectory planning method, called the "Robot Local Planner (RLP)." This method leverages unique features of home environments to enhance computational efficiency, motion optimality, and robustness against recognition and control errors, all while ensuring safety. The RLP minimizes computation time by planning with minimal waypoints and generating safe trajectories. Furthermore, overall motion optimality is improved by periodically executing trajectory planning to select more optimal motions. This approach incorporates inverse kinematics that are robust to base position errors, further enhancing robustness. Evaluation experiments demonstrated that the RLP outperformed existing methods in terms of motion planning time, motion duration, and robustness, confirming its effectiveness in home environments. Moreover, application experiments using a tidy-up task achieved high success rates and short operation times, thereby underscoring its practical feasibility.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel, periodic sampling-based local planner (RLP) designed for robot manipulation in home environments, demonstrating improved performance in speed, duration, and robustness compared to existing methods during tidy-up tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的、基于周期采样的局部规划器（RLP），专为家庭环境中的机器人操作而设计。实验表明，在执行整理任务时，该方法在速度、持续时间和鲁棒性方面均优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 本研究旨在实现家庭环境中快速且安全的操作任务。具体而言，我们的目标是开发一种系统，能够在运动中识别周围环境并识别目标物体，从而相应地规划和执行动作。我们提出了一种基于周期采样的全身轨迹规划方法，称为“机器人局部规划器(RLP)”。该方法利用家庭环境的独特特征来提高计算效率、运动最优性和对识别和控制误差的鲁棒性，同时确保安全性。 RLP通过规划最少的航路点并生成安全轨迹来最大限度地缩短计算时间。此外，通过周期性地执行轨迹规划来选择更优的运动，从而提高整体运动最优性。该方法结合了对基座位置误差具有鲁棒性的逆运动学，进一步增强了鲁棒性。评估实验表明，RLP在运动规划时间、运动持续时间和鲁棒性方面均优于现有方法，证实了其在家庭环境中的有效性。此外，使用整理任务的应用实验实现了较高的成功率和较短的操作时间，从而突出了其在实践中的可行性。

title: Large-scale Photorealistic Outdoor 3D Scene Reconstruction from UAV Imagery Using Gaussian Splatting Techniques
summary: In this study, we present an end-to-end pipeline capable of converting drone-captured video streams into high-fidelity 3D reconstructions with minimal latency. Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are extensively used in aerial real-time perception applications. Moreover, recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have demonstrated significant potential for real-time neural rendering. However, their integration into end-to-end UAV-based reconstruction and visualization systems remains underexplored. Our goal is to propose an efficient architecture that combines live video acquisition via RTMP streaming, synchronized sensor fusion, camera pose estimation, and 3DGS optimization, achieving continuous model updates and low-latency deployment within interactive visualization environments that supports immersive augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) applications. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves competitive visual fidelity, while delivering significantly higher rendering performance and substantially reduced end-to-end latency, compared to NeRF-based approaches. Reconstruction quality remains within 4-7\% of high-fidelity offline references, confirming the suitability of the proposed system for real-time, scalable augmented perception from aerial platforms.
tldr: This paper presents an end-to-end pipeline using 3D Gaussian Splatting for real-time, low-latency 3D reconstruction of outdoor scenes from UAV imagery, suitable for AR/VR applications.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种端到端流程，使用 3D Gaussian Splatting 从无人机图像进行室外场景的实时、低延迟 3D 重建，适用于 AR/VR 应用。
summary_zh: 本研究提出了一种端到端流程，能够以极低的延迟将无人机捕获的视频流转换为高保真度的3D重建。无人驾驶飞行器（UAV）被广泛应用于空中实时感知应用中。此外，3D高斯溅射（3DGS）的最新进展已经证明了其在实时神经渲染方面的巨大潜力。然而，它们集成到基于无人机的端到端重建和可视化系统中的潜力仍有待探索。我们的目标是提出一种高效的架构，该架构结合了通过RTMP流式传输实现的实时视频采集、同步传感器融合、相机姿态估计和3DGS优化，在交互式可视化环境中实现连续的模型更新和低延迟部署，并支持沉浸式增强现实和虚拟现实（AR/VR）应用。实验结果表明，与基于NeRF的方法相比，所提出的方法实现了具有竞争力的视觉保真度，同时提供了显著更高的渲染性能和大幅降低的端到端延迟。重建质量保持在高质量离线参考的4-7\%范围内，证实了所提出的系统适用于来自空中平台的实时、可扩展的增强感知。

title: Recurrent Structural Policy Gradient for Partially Observable Mean Field Games
summary: Mean Field Games (MFGs) provide a principled framework for modeling interactions in large population models: at scale, population dynamics become deterministic, with uncertainty entering only through aggregate shocks, or common noise. However, algorithmic progress has been limited since model-free methods are too high variance and exact methods scale poorly. Recent Hybrid Structural Methods (HSMs) use Monte Carlo rollouts for the common noise in combination with exact estimation of the expected return, conditioned on those samples. However, HSMs have not been scaled to Partially Observable settings. We propose Recurrent Structural Policy Gradient (RSPG), the first history-aware HSM for settings involving public information. We also introduce MFAX, our JAX-based framework for MFGs. By leveraging known transition dynamics, RSPG achieves state-of-the-art performance as well as an order-of-magnitude faster convergence and solves, for the first time, a macroeconomics MFG with heterogeneous agents, common noise and history-aware policies. MFAX is publicly available at: https://github.com/CWibault/mfax.
tldr: The paper introduces Recurrent Structural Policy Gradient (RSPG), a novel history-aware Hybrid Structural Method for solving Partially Observable Mean Field Games, along with the MFAX framework. It achieves state-of-the-art performance with faster convergence, demonstrated on a complex macroeconomics MFG.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了循环结构策略梯度（RSPG），一种新的历史感知混合结构方法，用于解决部分可观察的平均场博弈，以及MFAX框架。它实现了最先进的性能，收敛速度更快，并在复杂的宏观经济平均场博弈上进行了演示。
summary_zh: 平均场博弈(MFGs) 为大型群体模型的交互建模提供了一个原则性的框架：在大规模情况下，群体动态变得确定，不确定性仅通过聚合冲击或公共噪声进入。 然而，算法进展受到限制，因为无模型方法方差过高，而精确方法的可扩展性较差。 近期的混合结构方法 (HSMs) 使用蒙特卡罗展开模拟公共噪声，并结合那些样本条件下的预期回报的精确估计。 然而，HSMs尚未扩展到部分可观测的场景。 我们提出了递归结构策略梯度 (RSPG)，这是第一个用于涉及公共信息场景的、具有历史意识的 HSM 。 我们还介绍了 MFAX，我们基于 JAX 的 MFG 框架。 通过利用已知的转移动态，RSPG 实现了最先进的性能，以及数量级更快的收敛速度和求解速度。 并且首次求解了一个具有异质代理人、公共噪声和具有历史意识策略的宏观经济 MFG。 MFAX 可在以下网址公开获取：https://github.com/CWibault/mfax.

title: EW-DETR: Evolving World Object Detection via Incremental Low-Rank DEtection TRansformer
summary: Real-world object detection must operate in evolving environments where new classes emerge, domains shift, and unseen objects must be identified as "unknown": all without accessing prior data. We introduce Evolving World Object Detection (EWOD), a paradigm coupling incremental learning, domain adaptation, and unknown detection under exemplar-free constraints. To tackle EWOD, we propose EW-DETR framework that augments DETR-based detectors with three synergistic modules: Incremental LoRA Adapters for exemplar-free incremental learning under evolving domains; a Query-Norm Objectness Adapter that decouples objectness-aware features from DETR decoder queries; and Entropy-Aware Unknown Mixing for calibrated unknown detection. This framework generalises across DETR-based detectors, enabling state-of-the-art RF-DETR to operate effectively in evolving-world settings. We also introduce FOGS (Forgetting, Openness, Generalisation Score) to holistically evaluate performance across these dimensions. Extensive experiments on Pascal Series and Diverse Weather benchmarks show EW-DETR outperforms other methods, improving FOGS by 57.24%.
tldr: The paper introduces EW-DETR, a framework for object detection in evolving environments, addressing incremental learning, domain adaptation, and unknown object detection without prior data access, outperforming existing methods on benchmark datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了EW-DETR，一个用于在不断变化的环境中进行物体检测的框架，解决了增量学习、领域自适应和未知物体检测的问题，无需访问先验数据，并在基准数据集上优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 真实世界的物体检测必须在不断变化的环境中运行，其中新的类别出现、领域发生转移，并且必须将未见过的物体识别为“未知”，所有这些都不能访问先验数据。我们引入了演化世界物体检测（EWOD），这是一种将增量学习、领域自适应和未知检测在无范例约束下耦合的范式。为了解决EWOD，我们提出了EW-DETR框架，该框架通过三个协同模块来增强基于DETR的检测器：用于在演化领域下进行无范例增量学习的增量LoRA适配器；一个将目标性感知特征从DETR解码器查询中解耦的查询范数目标性适配器；以及用于校准的未知检测的熵感知未知混合。该框架可推广到基于DETR的检测器，使最先进的RF-DETR能够在演化世界环境中有效运行。我们还引入了FOGS（遗忘、开放性、泛化分数）来全面评估这些维度上的性能。在Pascal Series和Diverse Weather基准上的大量实验表明，EW-DETR优于其他方法，并将FOGS提高了57.24%。

title: SIMSPINE: A Biomechanics-Aware Simulation Framework for 3D Spine Motion Annotation and Benchmarking
summary: Modeling spinal motion is fundamental to understanding human biomechanics, yet remains underexplored in computer vision due to the spine's complex multi-joint kinematics and the lack of large-scale 3D annotations. We present a biomechanics-aware keypoint simulation framework that augments existing human pose datasets with anatomically consistent 3D spinal keypoints derived from musculoskeletal modeling. Using this framework, we create the first open dataset, named SIMSPINE, which provides sparse vertebra-level 3D spinal annotations for natural full-body motions in indoor multi-camera capture without external restraints. With 2.14 million frames, this enables data-driven learning of vertebral kinematics from subtle posture variations and bridges the gap between musculoskeletal simulation and computer vision. In addition, we release pretrained baselines covering fine-tuned 2D detectors, monocular 3D pose lifting models, and multi-view reconstruction pipelines, establishing a unified benchmark for biomechanically valid spine motion estimation. Specifically, our 2D spine baselines improve the state-of-the-art from 0.63 to 0.80 AUC in controlled environments, and from 0.91 to 0.93 AP for in-the-wild spine tracking. Together, the simulation framework and SIMSPINE dataset advance research in vision-based biomechanics, motion analysis, and digital human modeling by enabling reproducible, anatomically grounded 3D spine estimation under natural conditions.
tldr: The paper introduces SIMSPINE, a biomechanics-aware simulation framework and dataset of 3D spinal motions, with benchmarks for vision-based spine motion estimation, bridging the gap between musculoskeletal simulation and computer vision.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SIMSPINE，一个生物力学感知的3D脊柱运动仿真框架和数据集，以及用于视觉脊柱运动估计的基准，弥合了肌肉骨骼仿真和计算机视觉之间的差距。
summary_zh: 脊柱运动建模是理解人体生物力学的根本，但由于脊柱复杂的多关节运动学特性以及缺乏大规模的3D标注，在计算机视觉领域的研究仍显不足。我们提出了一种生物力学感知的关键点模拟框架，通过从肌肉骨骼建模导出的解剖学上一致的3D脊柱关键点来扩充现有人体姿态数据集。利用该框架，我们创建了首个开放数据集SIMSPINE，它为室内多摄像头捕捉的自然全身运动提供了稀疏的椎骨层面的3D脊柱标注，且无需外部约束。拥有214万帧数据，该数据集能够实现从细微的姿势变化中进行椎骨运动学的数据驱动学习，并弥合了肌肉骨骼模拟和计算机视觉之间的差距。此外，我们发布了预训练的基线模型，涵盖微调的2D检测器、单目3D姿态提升模型和多视图重建流程，为生物力学有效的脊柱运动估计建立了一个统一的基准。具体而言，我们的2D脊柱基线在受控环境中将现有最佳性能从0.63提高到0.80 AUC，在真实环境中的脊柱追踪方面将平均精度（AP）从0.91提高到0.93。总而言之，该模拟框架和SIMSPINE数据集通过在自然条件下实现可复现的、解剖学上稳固的3D脊柱估计，从而推动了基于视觉的生物力学、运动分析和数字人体建模领域的研究。

title: Knowing the Unknown: Interpretable Open-World Object Detection via Concept Decomposition Model
summary: Open-world object detection (OWOD) requires incrementally detecting known categories while reliably identifying unknown objects. Existing methods primarily focus on improving unknown recall, yet overlook interpretability, often leading to known-unknown confusion and reduced prediction reliability. This paper aims to make the entire OWOD framework interpretable, enabling the detector to truly "knowing the unknown". To this end, we propose a concept-driven InterPretable OWOD framework(IPOW) by introducing a Concept Decomposition Model (CDM) for OWOD, which explicitly decomposes the coupled RoI features in Faster R-CNN into discriminative, shared, and background concepts. Discriminative concepts identify the most discriminative features to enlarge the distances between known categories, while shared and background concepts, due to their strong generalization ability, can be readily transferred to detect unknown categories. Leveraging the interpretable framework, we identify that known-unknown confusion arises when unknown objects fall into the discriminative space of known classes. To address this, we propose Concept-Guided Rectification (CGR) to further resolve such confusion. Extensive experiments show that IPOW significantly improves unknown recall while mitigating confusion, and provides concept-level interpretability for both known and unknown predictions.
tldr: This paper introduces a concept-driven interpretable open-world object detection (OWOD) framework (IPOW) using a Concept Decomposition Model (CDM) to improve unknown object detection while maintaining interpretability and reducing known-unknown confusion.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种概念驱动的可解释开放世界目标检测（OWOD）框架IPOW，该框架使用概念分解模型（CDM）来提高未知对象检测，同时保持可解释性并减少已知-未知混淆。
summary_zh: 开放世界目标检测（OWOD）要求能够增量地检测已知类别，同时可靠地识别未知对象。现有方法主要侧重于提高未知召回率，却忽略了可解释性，这通常会导致已知-未知混淆并降低预测可靠性。本文旨在使整个 OWOD 框架具有可解释性，使检测器真正地“认识未知”。为此，我们提出了一种概念驱动的可解释 OWOD 框架（IPOW），通过引入一个用于 OWOD 的概念分解模型（CDM），将 Faster R-CNN 中的耦合 RoI 特征显式地分解为判别性、共享性和背景概念。判别性概念识别最具判别性的特征，以扩大已知类别之间的距离，而共享性和背景概念由于其较强的泛化能力，可以很容易地被用于检测未知类别。利用该可解释的框架，我们发现当未知对象落入已知类别的判别性空间时，会产生已知-未知混淆。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了概念引导修正（CGR）来进一步消除这种混淆。大量实验表明，IPOW 显著提高了未知召回率，同时减轻了混淆，并为已知和未知预测提供了概念级别的可解释性。

title: tttLRM: Test-Time Training for Long Context and Autoregressive 3D Reconstruction
summary: We propose tttLRM, a novel large 3D reconstruction model that leverages a Test-Time Training (TTT) layer to enable long-context, autoregressive 3D reconstruction with linear computational complexity, further scaling the model's capability. Our framework efficiently compresses multiple image observations into the fast weights of the TTT layer, forming an implicit 3D representation in the latent space that can be decoded into various explicit formats, such as Gaussian Splats (GS) for downstream applications. The online learning variant of our model supports progressive 3D reconstruction and refinement from streaming observations. We demonstrate that pretraining on novel view synthesis tasks effectively transfers to explicit 3D modeling, resulting in improved reconstruction quality and faster convergence. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves superior performance in feedforward 3D Gaussian reconstruction compared to state-of-the-art approaches on both objects and scenes.
tldr: The paper introduces tttLRM, a test-time training method for efficient autoregressive 3D reconstruction from multiple images, achieving state-of-the-art performance in 3D Gaussian reconstruction.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 tttLRM，一种用于高效自回归 3D 重建的测试时训练方法，它能够通过多个图像重建三维高斯模型，并在三维高斯重建中实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 我们提出tttLRM，一种新颖的大型3D重建模型，它利用测试时训练（TTT）层来实现长上下文、自回归3D重建，并具有线性计算复杂度，从而进一步扩展模型的能力。我们的框架高效地将多个图像观测压缩到TTT层的快速权重中，从而在潜在空间中形成隐式3D表示，该表示可以解码为各种显式格式，例如用于下游应用的高斯溅射（GS）。我们模型中的在线学习变体支持从流式观测中进行渐进式3D重建和细化。我们证明了在新视角合成任务上进行预训练能够有效地迁移到显式3D建模，从而提高重建质量并加快收敛速度。大量的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法在Objects和Scenes上的前馈3D高斯重建中实现了卓越的性能。

title: Surface-based Manipulation Using Tunable Compliant Porous-Elastic Soft Sensing
summary: There is a growing need for soft robotic platforms that perform gentle, precise handling of a wide variety of objects. Existing surface-based manipulation systems, however, lack the compliance and tactile feedback needed for delicate handling. This work introduces the COmpliant Porous-Elastic Soft Sensing (COPESS) integrated with inductive sensors for adaptive object manipulation and localised sensing. The design features a tunable lattice layer that simultaneously modulates mechanical compliance and sensing performance. By adjusting lattice geometry, both stiffness and sensor response can be tailored to handle objects with varying mechanical properties. Experiments demonstrate that by easily adjusting one parameter, the lattice density, from 7 % to 20 %, it is possible to significantly alter the sensitivity and operational force range (about -23x and 9x, respectively). This approach establishes a blueprint for creating adaptive, sensorized surfaces where mechanical and sensory properties are co-optimized, enabling passive, yet programmable, delicate manipulation.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel soft robotic sensing skin called COPESS that uses tunable porous-elastic material and inductive sensors to achieve adaptive object manipulation with compliance and tactile feedback.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型软机器人传感皮肤COPESS，它采用可调多孔弹性材料和电感传感器，以实现具有顺应性和触觉反馈的自适应物体操作。
summary_zh: 对能够对各种物体进行轻柔、精确操作的软体机器人平台的需求日益增长。然而，现有的基于表面的操作系统缺乏精细操作所需的柔顺性和触觉反馈。本研究介绍了一种集成了电感传感器的柔顺多孔弹性软传感(COPESS)技术，用于自适应物体操作和局部传感。该设计采用可调的晶格层，可同时调节机械柔顺性和传感性能。通过调整晶格几何形状，刚度和传感器响应均可定制，以处理具有不同机械性能的物体。实验表明，仅需轻松调整一个参数，即晶格密度（从7%到20%），就可以显著改变灵敏度和操作力范围（分别约为 -23倍和9倍）。该方法为创建具备自适应性、配备传感器的表面奠定了基础，其中机械和传感特性被共同优化，从而实现被动的、但可编程的精细操作。

title: EKF-Based Depth Camera and Deep Learning Fusion for UAV-Person Distance Estimation and Following in SAR Operations
summary: Search and rescue (SAR) operations require rapid responses to save lives or property. Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) equipped with vision-based systems support these missions through prior terrain investigation or real-time assistance during the mission itself. Vision-based UAV frameworks aid human search tasks by detecting and recognizing specific individuals, then tracking and following them while maintaining a safe distance. A key safety requirement for UAV following is the accurate estimation of the distance between camera and target object under real-world conditions, achieved by fusing multiple image modalities. UAVs with deep learning-based vision systems offer a new approach to the planning and execution of SAR operations. As part of the system for automatic people detection and face recognition using deep learning, in this paper we present the fusion of depth camera measurements and monocular camera-to-body distance estimation for robust tracking and following. Deep learning-based filtering of depth camera data and estimation of camera-to-body distance from a monocular camera are achieved with YOLO-pose, enabling real-time fusion of depth information using the Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) algorithm. The proposed subsystem, designed for use in drones, estimates and measures the distance between the depth camera and the human body keypoints, to maintain the safe distance between the drone and the human target. Our system provides an accurate estimated distance, which has been validated against motion capture ground truth data. The system has been tested in real time indoors, where it reduces the average errors, root mean square error (RMSE) and standard deviations of distance estimation up to 15,3\% in three tested scenarios.
tldr: This paper presents a system for UAV-based person following in SAR operations, fusing depth camera and monocular camera data using an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) and YOLO-pose to estimate and maintain a safe distance between the drone and the human target.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于无人机的SAR行动人员跟随系统，该系统使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）和YOLO-pose融合深度相机和单目相机数据，以估计并保持无人机与目标人员之间的安全距离。
summary_zh: 搜救（SAR）行动需要快速响应以挽救生命或财产。配备基于视觉系统的无人机（UAV）通过任务前的地形勘察或任务期间的实时辅助来支持这些任务。基于视觉的无人机框架通过检测和识别特定人员，然后在保持安全距离的同时跟踪和跟随他们来辅助人工搜索任务。无人机跟随的一项关键安全要求是在真实世界条件下准确估计相机与目标物体之间的距离，这通过融合多种图像模态来实现。采用基于深度学习的视觉系统的无人机为搜救行动的规划和执行提供了一种新方法。作为使用深度学习进行人员自动检测和面部识别的系统的一部分，本文提出了深度相机测量和单目相机到人体距离估计的融合，以实现鲁棒的跟踪和跟随。基于深度学习的深度相机数据过滤和基于单目相机的相机到人体距离估计通过YOLO-pose实现，从而能够使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF）算法实时融合深度信息。所提出的子系统，设计用于无人机，用于估计和测量深度相机与人体关键点之间的距离，以保持无人机与目标人员之间的安全距离。我们的系统提供了一个精确的估计距离，该距离已经通过运动捕捉真值数据得到了验证。该系统已经在室内进行了实时测试，在三个测试场景中，它将距离估计的平均误差、均方根误差（RMSE）和标准差降低了高达15.3％。

title: Real-time Motion Segmentation with Event-based Normal Flow
summary: Event-based cameras are bio-inspired sensors with pixels that independently and asynchronously respond to brightness changes at microsecond resolution, offering the potential to handle visual tasks in challenging scenarios. However, due to the sparse information content in individual events, directly processing the raw event data to solve vision tasks is highly inefficient, which severely limits the applicability of state-of-the-art methods in real-time tasks, such as motion segmentation, a fundamental task for dynamic scene understanding. Incorporating normal flow as an intermediate representation to compress motion information from event clusters within a localized region provides a more effective solution. In this work, we propose a normal flow-based motion segmentation framework for event-based vision. Leveraging the dense normal flow directly learned from event neighborhoods as input, we formulate the motion segmentation task as an energy minimization problem solved via graph cuts, and optimize it iteratively with normal flow clustering and motion model fitting. By using a normal flow-based motion model initialization and fitting method, the proposed system is able to efficiently estimate the motion models of independently moving objects with only a limited number of candidate models, which significantly reduces the computational complexity and ensures real-time performance, achieving nearly a 800x speedup in comparison to the open-source state-of-the-art method. Extensive evaluations on multiple public datasets fully demonstrate the accuracy and efficiency of our framework.
tldr: This paper introduces a real-time motion segmentation framework for event-based vision using normal flow as an intermediate representation, achieving significant speedups compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于事件的视觉的实时运动分割框架，使用法向流作为中间表示，与现有方法相比实现了显著的加速。
summary_zh: 基于事件的相机是一种生物启发型传感器，其像素独立且异步地以微秒级分辨率响应亮度变化，从而有潜力处理具有挑战性场景下的视觉任务。然而，由于单个事件中包含的信息稀疏，直接处理原始事件数据来解决视觉任务效率极低，这严重限制了现有先进方法在实时任务中的适用性，例如运动分割，这是动态场景理解的一项基本任务。将法向流作为一种中间表示来压缩局部区域内事件簇的运动信息，提供了一种更有效的解决方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于法向流的运动分割框架，用于基于事件的视觉。利用直接从事件邻域学习到的密集法向流作为输入，我们将运动分割任务表述为一个通过图割求解的能量最小化问题，并通过法向流聚类和运动模型拟合对其进行迭代优化。通过使用基于法向流的运动模型初始化和拟合方法，所提出的系统能够仅用有限数量的候选模型有效地估计独立运动物体的运动模型，从而显著降低计算复杂度并确保实时性能，与开源的先进方法相比，速度提高了近800倍。在多个公共数据集上的广泛评估充分证明了我们框架的准确性和效率。

title: Object-Scene-Camera Decomposition and Recomposition for Data-Efficient Monocular 3D Object Detection
summary: Monocular 3D object detection (M3OD) is intrinsically ill-posed, hence training a high-performance deep learning based M3OD model requires a humongous amount of labeled data with complicated visual variation from diverse scenes, variety of objects and camera poses.However, we observe that, due to strong human bias, the three independent entities, i.e., object, scene, and camera pose, are always tightly entangled when an image is captured to construct training data. More specifically, specific 3D objects are always captured in particular scenes with fixed camera poses, and hence lacks necessary diversity. Such tight entanglement induces the challenging issues of insufficient utilization and overfitting to uniform training data. To mitigate this, we propose an online object-scene-camera decomposition and recomposition data manipulation scheme to more efficiently exploit the training data. We first fully decompose training images into textured 3D object point models and background scenes in an efficient computation and storage manner. We then continuously recompose new training images in each epoch by inserting the 3D objects into the freespace of the background scenes, and rendering them with perturbed camera poses from textured 3D point representation. In this way, the refreshed training data in all epochs can cover the full spectrum of independent object, scene, and camera pose combinations. This scheme can serve as a plug-and-play component to boost M3OD models, working flexibly with both fully and sparsely supervised settings. In the sparsely-supervised setting, objects closest to the ego-camera for all instances are sparsely annotated. We then can flexibly increase the annotated objects to control annotation cost. For validation, our method is widely applied to five representative M3OD models and evaluated on both the KITTI and the more complicated Waymo datasets.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel data augmentation technique for monocular 3D object detection that decouples and recomposes objects, scenes, and camera poses to improve data efficiency and model generalization, especially benefiting sparsely-supervised settings.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的单目3D物体检测数据增广技术，通过解耦和重组物体、场景和相机姿态，提高数据效率和模型泛化能力，尤其是在稀疏监督设置下获益。
summary_zh: 单目3D目标检测(M3OD)本质上是一个病态问题，因此训练一个基于深度学习的高性能M3OD模型需要海量的标注数据，这些数据必须包含来自不同场景、多种物体种类和相机姿态的复杂视觉变化。然而，我们观察到，由于强烈的人为偏见，在捕获图像以构建训练数据时，三个独立的实体，即物体、场景和相机姿态，总是紧密地纠缠在一起。更具体地说，特定的3D物体总是在特定的场景中以固定的相机姿态被捕获，因此缺乏必要的多样性。这种紧密的纠缠导致了对统一训练数据利用不足和过拟合的难题。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种在线的物体-场景-相机分解与重组数据操作方案，以更有效地利用训练数据。我们首先以高效的计算和存储方式将训练图像完全分解为带纹理的3D物体点模型和背景场景。然后，我们在每个epoch中通过将3D物体插入到背景场景的自由空间中，并从带纹理的3D点表示中用扰动的相机姿态来渲染它们，从而不断地重组新的训练图像。通过这种方式，在所有epoch中刷新的训练数据可以覆盖独立物体、场景和相机姿态组合的完整范围。该方案可以作为一个即插即用的组件来提升M3OD模型，在完全监督和稀疏监督设置下都能灵活地工作。在稀疏监督设置中，对于所有实例，最靠近自车相机的物体会被稀疏地标注。然后，我们可以灵活地增加标注的物体数量来控制标注成本。为了验证，我们的方法被广泛应用于五个具有代表性的M3OD模型，并在KITTI和更复杂的Waymo数据集上进行了评估。

title: Long-Term Multi-Session 3D Reconstruction Under Substantial Appearance Change
summary: Long-term environmental monitoring requires the ability to reconstruct and align 3D models across repeated site visits separated by months or years. However, existing Structure-from-Motion (SfM) pipelines implicitly assume near-simultaneous image capture and limited appearance change, and therefore fail when applied to long-term monitoring scenarios such as coral reef surveys, where substantial visual and structural change is common. In this paper, we show that the primary limitation of current approaches lies in their reliance on post-hoc alignment of independently reconstructed sessions, which is insufficient under large temporal appearance change. We address this limitation by enforcing cross-session correspondences directly within a joint SfM reconstruction. Our approach combines complementary handcrafted and learned visual features to robustly establish correspondences across large temporal gaps, enabling the reconstruction of a single coherent 3D model from imagery captured years apart, where standard independent and joint SfM pipelines break down. We evaluate our method on long-term coral reef datasets exhibiting significant real-world change, and demonstrate consistent joint reconstruction across sessions in cases where existing methods fail to produce coherent reconstructions. To ensure scalability to large datasets, we further restrict expensive learned feature matching to a small set of likely cross-session image pairs identified via visual place recognition, which reduces computational cost and improves alignment robustness.
tldr: This paper presents a novel Structure-from-Motion (SfM) pipeline that enforces cross-session correspondences directly within a joint reconstruction, enabling coherent 3D model creation from images captured years apart, even with significant appearance changes.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的运动结构（SfM）流程，它在联合重建中直接强制执行跨会话对应关系，从而能够从几年前拍摄的图像创建连贯的3D模型，即使外观变化很大。
summary_zh: 长期环境监测需要能够重建和对齐在数月或数年时间间隔下重复现场访问的3D模型。然而，现有的运动结构（SfM）流程隐含地假设近乎同步的图像采集和有限的外观变化，因此无法应用于珊瑚礁调查等长期监测场景，在这些场景中，视觉和结构变化是常见的。在本文中，我们表明，当前方法的主要局限性在于它们依赖于独立重建会话的事后对齐，这在大的时间外观变化下是不够的。我们通过在联合SfM重建中直接强制执行跨会话对应关系来解决此限制。我们的方法结合了互补的手工和学习的视觉特征，以稳健地建立跨越较大时间间隔的对应关系，从而能够从相隔数年捕获的图像中重建单个连贯的3D模型，而标准的独立和联合SfM流程会失效。我们在展示显著真实世界变化的长期珊瑚礁数据集上评估了我们的方法，并证明了在现有方法无法产生连贯重建的情况下，跨会话的一致联合重建。为了确保可扩展到大型数据集，我们进一步将昂贵的学习特征匹配限制到通过视觉地点识别确定的一小部分可能的跨会话图像对，这降低了计算成本并提高了对齐的稳健性。

title: POMDPPlanners: Open-Source Package for POMDP Planning
summary: We present POMDPPlanners, an open-source Python package for empirical evaluation of Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP) planning algorithms. The package integrates state-of-the-art planning algorithms, a suite of benchmark environments with safety-critical variants, automated hyperparameter optimization via Optuna, persistent caching with failure recovery, and configurable parallel simulation -- reducing the overhead of extensive simulation studies. POMDPPlanners is designed to enable scalable, reproducible research on decision-making under uncertainty, with particular emphasis on risk-sensitive settings where standard toolkits fall short.
tldr: POMDPPlanners is an open-source Python package providing state-of-the-art POMDP planning algorithms, benchmark environments, and tools for scalable, reproducible research, especially in risk-sensitive settings.
tldr_zh: POMDPPlanners 是一个开源 Python 包，提供最先进的 POMDP 规划算法、基准环境，以及用于可扩展、可重复研究的工具，尤其是在风险敏感的环境中。
summary_zh: 我们提出了POMDPPlanners，一个开源的Python软件包，用于对部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程(POMDP)规划算法进行实证评估。该软件包集成了最先进的规划算法、一套包含安全关键变体的基准环境、通过Optuna实现的自动化超参数优化、具有故障恢复功能的持久缓存以及可配置的并行仿真，从而降低了大规模仿真研究的开销。POMDPPlanners旨在实现不确定性下决策制定的可扩展、可复现的研究，尤其侧重于标准工具包无法胜任的风险敏感型设置。

title: When can we trust untrusted monitoring? A safety case sketch across collusion strategies
summary: AIs are increasingly being deployed with greater autonomy and capabilities, which increases the risk that a misaligned AI may be able to cause catastrophic harm. Untrusted monitoring -- using one untrusted model to oversee another -- is one approach to reducing risk. Justifying the safety of an untrusted monitoring deployment is challenging because developers cannot safely deploy a misaligned model to test their protocol directly. In this paper, we develop upon existing methods for rigorously demonstrating safety based on pre-deployment testing. We relax assumptions that previous AI control research made about the collusion strategies a misaligned AI might use to subvert untrusted monitoring. We develop a taxonomy covering passive self-recognition, causal collusion (hiding pre-shared signals), acausal collusion (hiding signals via Schelling points), and combined strategies. We create a safety case sketch to clearly present our argument, explicitly state our assumptions, and highlight unsolved challenges. We identify conditions under which passive self-recognition could be a more effective collusion strategy than those studied previously. Our work builds towards more robust evaluations of untrusted monitoring.
tldr: This paper analyzes the safety of "untrusted monitoring" of AIs, considering various collusion strategies that a misaligned AI might employ to subvert the monitoring process. It proposes a taxonomy of collusion strategies and sketches a safety case for this approach.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了AI的“不可信监控”的安全性，考虑了错位AI可能用来破坏监控过程的各种勾结策略。它提出了勾结策略的分类，并概述了这种方法的安全案例。
summary_zh: 人工智能正以更高的自主性和能力被日益广泛地部署，这增加了对齐不良的人工智能可能造成灾难性危害的风险。不可信监控--使用一个不可信的模型来监督另一个模型--是一种降低风险的方法。证明不可信监控部署的安全性具有挑战性，因为开发者无法安全地部署对齐不良的模型来直接测试他们的协议。在本文中，我们基于预部署测试，对现有严格证明安全性的方法进行了改进。我们放宽了以往人工智能控制研究对对齐不良的人工智能可能采用的串谋策略，以颠覆不可信监控的假设。我们提出了一个分类体系，涵盖被动自我识别、因果串谋（隐藏预先共享的信号）、非因果串谋（通过谢林点隐藏信号）以及组合策略。我们创建了一个安全案例草图，以清晰地呈现我们的论点，明确地陈述我们的假设，并突出未解决的挑战。我们确定了被动自我识别在哪些条件下可能比以前研究的串谋策略更有效。我们的工作旨在构建更强大的不可信监控评估方法。

title: Monocular Endoscopic Tissue 3D Reconstruction with Multi-Level Geometry Regularization
summary: Reconstructing deformable endoscopic tissues is crucial for achieving robot-assisted surgery. However, 3D Gaussian Splatting-based approaches encounter challenges in achieving consistent tissue surface reconstruction, while existing NeRF-based methods lack real-time rendering capabilities. In pursuit of both smooth deformable surfaces and real-time rendering, we introduce a novel approach based on 3D Gaussian Splatting. Specifically, we introduce surface-aware reconstruction, initially employing a Sign Distance Field-based method to construct a mesh, subsequently utilizing this mesh to constrain the Gaussian Splatting reconstruction process. Furthermore, to ensure the generation of physically plausible deformations, we incorporate local rigidity and global non-rigidity restrictions to guide Gaussian deformation, tailored for the highly deformable nature of soft endoscopic tissue. Based on 3D Gaussian Splatting, our proposed method delivers a fast rendering process and smooth surface appearances. Quantitative and qualitative analysis against alternative methodologies shows that our approach achieves solid reconstruction quality in both textures and geometries.
tldr: This paper presents a 3D Gaussian Splatting-based method for monocular endoscopic tissue reconstruction, incorporating surface-aware reconstruction and deformation restrictions to achieve smooth surfaces and real-time rendering.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于3D高斯溅射的单目内窥镜组织重建方法，该方法结合了表面感知重建和变形约束，以实现平滑的表面和实时渲染。
summary_zh: 重建可变形的内窥镜组织对于实现机器人辅助手术至关重要。然而，基于3D高斯溅射的方法在实现一致的组织表面重建方面面临挑战，而现有的基于NeRF的方法缺乏实时渲染能力。为了同时追求平滑的可变形表面和实时渲染，我们提出了一种基于3D高斯溅射的新方法。具体来说，我们引入了表面感知重建，首先采用基于符号距离场的方法构建网格，然后利用该网格来约束高斯溅射重建过程。此外，为了确保生成物理上合理的形变，我们结合了局部刚性和全局非刚性约束来引导高斯形变，专为软性内窥镜组织的高度可变形特性而设计。基于3D高斯溅射，我们提出的方法能够实现快速的渲染过程和平滑的表面外观。与替代方法的定量和定性分析表明，我们的方法在纹理和几何结构方面都实现了可靠的重建质量。

title: BoxSplitGen: A Generative Model for 3D Part Bounding Boxes in Varying Granularity
summary: Human creativity follows a perceptual process, moving from abstract ideas to finer details during creation. While 3D generative models have advanced dramatically, models specifically designed to assist human imagination in 3D creation -- particularly for detailing abstractions from coarse to fine -- have not been explored. We propose a framework that enables intuitive and interactive 3D shape generation by iteratively splitting bounding boxes to refine the set of bounding boxes. The main technical components of our framework are two generative models: the box-splitting generative model and the box-to-shape generative model. The first model, named BoxSplitGen, generates a collection of 3D part bounding boxes with varying granularity by iteratively splitting coarse bounding boxes. It utilizes part bounding boxes created through agglomerative merging and learns the reverse of the merging process -- the splitting sequences. The model consists of two main components: the first learns the categorical distribution of the box to be split, and the second learns the distribution of the two new boxes, given the set of boxes and the indication of which box to split. The second model, the box-to-shape generative model, is trained by leveraging the 3D shape priors learned by an existing 3D diffusion model while adapting the model to incorporate bounding box conditioning. In our experiments, we demonstrate that the box-splitting generative model outperforms token prediction models and the inpainting approach with an unconditional diffusion model. Also, we show that our box-to-shape model, based on a state-of-the-art 3D diffusion model, provides superior results compared to a previous model.
tldr: The paper introduces BoxSplitGen, a generative framework for 3D shape creation that iteratively refines bounding boxes from coarse to fine, using two generative models: one for box splitting and another for converting boxes to shapes, outperforming existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了BoxSplitGen，一个用于3D形状生成的框架，通过迭代地细化边界框来实现从粗略到精细的创建过程。该框架使用两个生成模型：一个用于边界框拆分，另一个用于将边界框转换为形状，并在性能上优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 人类的创造力遵循一种感知过程，在创作过程中从抽象想法转向更精细的细节。虽然3D生成模型已经取得了显著的进展，但专门用于辅助人类在3D创作中进行想象的模型 —— 特别是用于将抽象概念从粗糙到精细地进行详细描述的模型 —— 尚未得到探索。我们提出了一种框架，通过迭代分割边界框来细化边界框集合，从而实现直观和交互式的3D形状生成。该框架的主要技术组成部分是两个生成模型：框分割生成模型和框到形状生成模型。第一个模型，名为BoxSplitGen，通过迭代分割粗糙边界框来生成一组具有不同粒度的3D零件边界框。它利用通过凝聚式合并创建的零件边界框，并学习合并过程的反向过程 —— 分割序列。该模型由两个主要组成部分组成：第一个学习要分割的框的类别分布，第二个学习两个新框的分布，给定框集合和要分割的框的指示。第二个模型，框到形状生成模型，通过利用现有3D扩散模型学习的3D形状先验进行训练，同时调整该模型以包含边界框条件。在我们的实验中，我们证明了框分割生成模型优于token预测模型以及使用无条件扩散模型的图像修复方法。此外，我们表明，我们基于最先进的3D扩散模型的框到形状模型，相比之前的模型提供了更优越的结果。

title: SD4R: Sparse-to-Dense Learning for 3D Object Detection with 4D Radar
summary: 4D radar measurements offer an affordable and weather-robust solution for 3D perception. However, the inherent sparsity and noise of radar point clouds present significant challenges for accurate 3D object detection, underscoring the need for effective and robust point clouds densification. Despite recent progress, existing densification methods often fail to address the extreme sparsity of 4D radar point clouds and exhibit limited robustness when processing scenes with a small number of points. In this paper, we propose SD4R, a novel framework that transforms sparse radar point clouds into dense representations. SD4R begins by utilizing a foreground point generator (FPG) to mitigate noise propagation and produce densified point clouds. Subsequently, a logit-query encoder (LQE) enhances conventional pillarization, resulting in robust feature representations. Through these innovations, our SD4R demonstrates strong capability in both noise reduction and foreground point densification. Extensive experiments conducted on the publicly available View-of-Delft dataset demonstrate that SD4R achieves state-of-the-art performance. Source code is available at https://github.com/lancelot0805/SD4R.
tldr: The paper introduces SD4R, a novel method for densifying sparse 4D radar point clouds for 3D object detection, achieving state-of-the-art results on the View-of-Delft dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SD4R，一种用于密集化稀疏 4D 雷达点云以进行 3D 物体检测的新方法，在 View-of-Delft 数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 4D雷达测量为3D感知提供了一种经济且具气象鲁棒性的解决方案。然而，雷达点云固有的稀疏性和噪声给精确的3D目标检测带来了重大挑战，凸显了有效且鲁棒的点云稠密化的必要性。尽管最近取得了一些进展，但现有的稠密化方法通常无法解决4D雷达点云的极端稀疏性，并且在处理点数较少的场景时表现出有限的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的框架SD4R，该框架将稀疏的雷达点云转换为密集的表示。 SD4R首先利用前景点生成器（FPG）来减轻噪声传播并生成稠密化的点云。随后，logit查询编码器（LQE）增强了传统的体素化，从而产生稳健的特征表示。通过这些创新，我们的SD4R在降噪和前景点稠密化方面都表现出强大的能力。在公开的View-of-Delft数据集上进行的大量实验表明，SD4R实现了最先进的性能。源代码可在https://github.com/lancelot0805/SD4R获取。

title: Boosting Instance Awareness via Cross-View Correlation with 4D Radar and Camera for 3D Object Detection
summary: 4D millimeter-wave radar has emerged as a promising sensing modality for autonomous driving due to its robustness and affordability. However, its sparse and weak geometric cues make reliable instance activation difficult, limiting the effectiveness of existing radar-camera fusion paradigms. BEV-level fusion offers global scene understanding but suffers from weak instance focus, while perspective-level fusion captures instance details but lacks holistic context. To address these limitations, we propose SIFormer, a scene-instance aware transformer for 3D object detection using 4D radar and camera. SIFormer first suppresses background noise during view transformation through segmentation- and depth-guided localization. It then introduces a cross-view activation mechanism that injects 2D instance cues into BEV space, enabling reliable instance awareness under weak radar geometry. Finally, a transformer-based fusion module aggregates complementary image semantics and radar geometry for robust perception. As a result, with the aim of enhancing instance awareness, SIFormer bridges the gap between the two paradigms, combining their complementary strengths to address inherent sparse nature of radar and improve detection accuracy. Experiments demonstrate that SIFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance on View-of-Delft, TJ4DRadSet and NuScenes datasets. Source code is available at github.com/shawnnnkb/SIFormer.
tldr: The paper presents SIFormer, a novel scene-instance aware transformer that fuses 4D radar and camera data for improved 3D object detection in autonomous driving, achieving state-of-the-art results on multiple datasets by addressing radar's sparsity issue.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了SIFormer，一种新的场景实例感知Transformer，融合4D雷达和相机数据，以改进自动驾驶中的3D物体检测。通过解决雷达的稀疏性问题，SIFormer在多个数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh:
摘要：
4D毫米波雷达因其鲁棒性和经济性，已成为自动驾驶领域极具前景的传感方式。然而，其稀疏且微弱的几何线索使得可靠的目标激活变得困难，限制了现有雷达-相机融合范式的能力。BEV（鸟瞰图）层面的融合提供了全局场景理解，但缺乏对目标的关注，而透视层面的融合则捕捉了目标细节，但缺乏整体上下文。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种名为SIFormer的场景-目标感知Transformer，用于使用4D雷达和相机进行3D目标检测。SIFormer首先通过分割和深度引导的定位，抑制视图变换期间的背景噪声。然后，它引入了一种跨视图激活机制，将2D目标线索注入到BEV空间中，从而在微弱的雷达几何条件下实现可靠的目标感知。最后，一个基于Transformer的融合模块聚合互补的图像语义和雷达几何信息，以实现强大的感知能力。因此，以增强目标感知为目标，SIFormer弥合了两种范式之间的差距，结合了它们互补的优势，以解决雷达固有的稀疏性并提高检测精度。实验表明，SIFormer在View-of-Delft、TJ4DRadSet和NuScenes数据集上实现了最先进的性能。源代码可在github.com/shawnnnkb/SIFormer上获取。

title: PropFly: Learning to Propagate via On-the-Fly Supervision from Pre-trained Video Diffusion Models
summary: Propagation-based video editing enables precise user control by propagating a single edited frame into following frames while maintaining the original context such as motion and structures. However, training such models requires large-scale, paired (source and edited) video datasets, which are costly and complex to acquire. Hence, we propose the PropFly, a training pipeline for Propagation-based video editing, relying on on-the-Fly supervision from pre-trained video diffusion models (VDMs) instead of requiring off-the-shelf or precomputed paired video editing datasets. Specifically, our PropFly leverages one-step clean latent estimations from intermediate noised latents with varying Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) scales to synthesize diverse pairs of 'source' (low-CFG) and 'edited' (high-CFG) latents on-the-fly. The source latent serves as structural information of the video, while the edited latent provides the target transformation for learning propagation. Our pipeline enables an additional adapter attached to the pre-trained VDM to learn to propagate edits via Guidance-Modulated Flow Matching (GMFM) loss, which guides the model to replicate the target transformation. Our on-the-fly supervision ensures the model to learn temporally consistent and dynamic transformations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our PropFly significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on various video editing tasks, producing high-quality editing results.
tldr: The paper introduces PropFly, a method for training propagation-based video editing models using on-the-fly supervision from pre-trained video diffusion models, eliminating the need for paired video datasets. It learns to propagate edits via Guidance-Modulated Flow Matching, achieving superior results in various video editing tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了PropFly，一种利用预训练视频扩散模型进行即时监督来训练基于传播的视频编辑模型的方法，无需配对的视频数据集。它通过引导调制流匹配学习传播编辑，并在各种视频编辑任务中取得了优异的成果。
summary_zh: 基于传播的视频编辑通过将单个编辑帧传播到后续帧，同时保持原始上下文（例如运动和结构），从而实现精确的用户控制。然而，训练此类模型需要大规模的配对（源和编辑后）视频数据集，这既昂贵又复杂。因此，我们提出 PropFly，一种基于传播的视频编辑的训练流程，它依赖于来自预训练视频扩散模型（VDM）的即时监督，而不是需要现成的或预计算的配对视频编辑数据集。具体来说，我们的PropFly利用具有不同无分类器引导（CFG）尺度的中间噪声潜变量的单步干净潜变量估计，来即时合成各种“源”（低CFG）和“编辑后”（高CFG）潜变量对。源潜变量充当视频的结构信息，而编辑后的潜变量提供用于学习传播的目标变换。我们的流程使附加到预训练VDM的额外适配器能够学习通过引导调制流匹配（GMFM）损失传播编辑，该损失引导模型复制目标变换。我们的即时监督确保模型学习到时间上一致且动态的变换。大量实验表明，我们的PropFly在各种视频编辑任务上显著优于最先进的方法，产生高质量的编辑结果。

title: Aesthetic Camera Viewpoint Suggestion with 3D Aesthetic Field
summary: The aesthetic quality of a scene depends strongly on camera viewpoint. Existing approaches for aesthetic viewpoint suggestion are either single-view adjustments, predicting limited camera adjustments from a single image without understanding scene geometry, or 3D exploration approaches, which rely on dense captures or prebuilt 3D environments coupled with costly reinforcement learning (RL) searches. In this work, we introduce the notion of 3D aesthetic field that enables geometry-grounded aesthetic reasoning in 3D with sparse captures, allowing efficient viewpoint suggestions in contrast to costly RL searches. We opt to learn this 3D aesthetic field using a feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting network that distills high-level aesthetic knowledge from a pretrained 2D aesthetic model into 3D space, enabling aesthetic prediction for novel viewpoints from only sparse input views. Building on this field, we propose a two-stage search pipeline that combines coarse viewpoint sampling with gradient-based refinement, efficiently identifying aesthetically appealing viewpoints without dense captures or RL exploration. Extensive experiments show that our method consistently suggests viewpoints with superior framing and composition compared to existing approaches, establishing a new direction toward 3D-aware aesthetic modeling.
tldr: This paper proposes a method for aesthetic camera viewpoint suggestion using a 3D aesthetic field learned from sparse views, avoiding the need for dense captures or reinforcement learning.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种利用从稀疏视角学习的3D美学场来推荐美学相机视点的方法，避免了使用密集捕捉或强化学习。
summary_zh: 场景的美学质量强烈依赖于相机视角。现有的美学视角建议方法要么是单视角调整，即从单张图像预测有限的相机调整而不理解场景几何结构；要么是3D探索方法，依赖于密集的捕捉数据或预先构建的3D环境，并结合代价高昂的强化学习（RL）搜索。在这项工作中，我们引入了3D美学场的概念，它能够在稀疏捕捉数据的基础上进行基于几何结构的3D美学推理，从而实现高效的视角建议，而无需代价高昂的RL搜索。我们选择使用前馈3D高斯溅射网络来学习这个3D美学场，该网络将预训练的2D美学模型中的高层美学知识提炼到3D空间中，从而仅利用稀疏的输入视角就能预测新视角的审美价值。在此基础上，我们提出了一种两阶段搜索流程，它结合了粗略的视角采样和基于梯度的细化，从而高效地识别出具有美学吸引力的视角，而无需密集的捕捉数据或RL探索。大量实验表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法能够始终如一地提出具有更好构图和取景的视角，为3D感知美学建模开辟了一个新的方向。

title: N4MC: Neural 4D Mesh Compression
summary: We present N4MC, the first 4D neural compression framework to efficiently compress time-varying mesh sequences by exploiting their temporal redundancy. Unlike prior neural mesh compression methods that treat each mesh frame independently, N4MC takes inspiration from inter-frame compression in 2D video codecs, and learns motion compensation in long mesh sequences. Specifically, N4MC converts consecutive irregular mesh frames into regular 4D tensors to provide a uniform and compact representation. These tensors are then condensed using an auto-decoder, which captures both spatial and temporal correlations for redundancy removal. To enhance temporal coherence, we introduce a transformer-based interpolation model that predicts intermediate mesh frames conditioned on latent embeddings derived from tracked volume centers, eliminating motion ambiguities. Extensive evaluations show that N4MC outperforms state-of-the-art in rate-distortion performance, while enabling real-time decoding of 4D mesh sequences. The implementation of our method is available at: https://github.com/frozzzen3/N4MC.
tldr: N4MC is a novel 4D neural compression framework for time-varying mesh sequences using motion compensation and a transformer-based interpolation model for real-time decoding, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
tldr_zh: N4MC是一种新颖的 4D 神经压缩框架，用于时变网格序列，它采用运动补偿和基于 Transformer 的插值模型实现实时解码，优于当前最优方法。
summary_zh: 我们提出了 N4MC，这是首个 4D 神经压缩框架，旨在通过利用时变网格序列的时间冗余来高效压缩它们。与先前独立处理每个网格帧的神经网格压缩方法不同，N4MC 从 2D 视频编解码器中的帧间压缩获得灵感，并学习长网格序列中的运动补偿。具体而言，N4MC 将连续的不规则网格帧转换为规则的 4D 张量，以提供统一且紧凑的表示。然后，使用自解码器压缩这些张量，该自解码器捕获空间和时间相关性以消除冗余。为了增强时间连贯性，我们引入了一种基于 Transformer 的插值模型，该模型以从跟踪的体中心导出的潜在嵌入为条件，预测中间网格帧，从而消除运动歧义。广泛的评估表明，N4MC 在率失真性能方面优于最先进的方法，同时能够实现 4D 网格序列的实时解码。我们的方法的实现可在以下网址获得：https://github.com/frozzzen3/N4MC。

title: MAST: A Multi-fidelity Augmented Surrogate model via Spatial Trust-weighting
summary: In engineering design and scientific computing, computational cost and predictive accuracy are intrinsically coupled. High-fidelity simulations provide accurate predictions but at substantial computational costs, while lower-fidelity approximations offer efficiency at the expense of accuracy. Multi-fidelity surrogate modelling addresses this trade-off by combining abundant low-fidelity data with sparse high-fidelity observations. However, existing methods suffer from expensive training cost or rely on global correlation assumptions that often fail in practice to capture how fidelity relationships vary across the input space, leading to poor performance particularly under tight budget constraints. We introduce MAST, a method that blends corrected low-fidelity observations with high-fidelity predictions, trusting high-fidelity near observed samples and relying on corrected low-fidelity elsewhere. MAST achieves this through explicit discrepancy modelling and distance-based weighting with closed-form variance propagation, producing a single heteroscedastic Gaussian process. Across multi-fidelity synthetic benchmarks, MAST shows a marked improvement over the current state-of-the-art techniques. Crucially, MAST maintains robust performance across varying total budget and fidelity gaps, conditions under which competing methods exhibit significant degradation or unstable behaviour.
tldr: The paper introduces MAST, a multi-fidelity surrogate modeling method that combines high- and low-fidelity data using spatial trust-weighting to improve prediction accuracy and robustness under varying budget constraints, outperforming existing approaches.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为MAST的多精度代理模型方法，该方法通过空间信任加权结合高精度和低精度数据，提高了预测精度和在不同预算约束下的鲁棒性，优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 在工程设计和科学计算中，计算成本和预测精度本质上是相互关联的。高保真度模拟提供准确的预测，但计算成本高昂，而低保真度近似则以牺牲精度为代价来提高效率。多保真度代理建模通过结合丰富的低保真度数据和稀疏的高保真度观测来解决这一权衡。然而，现有方法存在训练成本高昂或依赖全局相关性假设的问题，这些假设在实践中通常无法捕捉保真度关系如何在输入空间中变化，从而导致性能不佳，尤其是在预算紧张的情况下。我们提出了MAST，一种将校正后的低保真度观测与高保真度预测相结合的方法，在高保真度样本附近信任高保真度，并在其他地方依赖校正后的低保真度。MAST通过显式差异建模和基于距离的加权以及闭式方差传播来实现这一点，生成一个异方差高斯过程。在多保真度合成基准测试中，MAST与当前最先进的技术相比显示出显著的改进。至关重要的是，MAST在变化的总体预算和保真度差距下保持稳健的性能，而竞争方法在这些条件下表现出明显的退化或不稳定的行为。

title: A Micro-Macro Model of Encounter-Driven Information Diffusion in Robot Swarms
summary: In this paper, we propose the problem of Encounter-Driven Information Diffusion (EDID). In EDID, robots are allowed to exchange information only upon meeting. Crucially, EDID assumes that the robots are not allowed to schedule their meetings. As such, the robots have no means to anticipate when, where, and who they will meet. As a step towards the design of storage and routing algorithms for EDID, in this paper we propose a model of information diffusion that captures the essential dynamics of EDID. The model is derived from first principles and is composed of two levels: a micro model, based on a generalization of the concept of `mean free path'; and a macro model, which captures the global dynamics of information diffusion. We validate the model through extensive robot simulations, in which we consider swarm size, communication range, environment size, and different random motion regimes. We conclude the paper with a discussion of the implications of this model on the algorithms that best support information diffusion according to the parameters of interest.
tldr: This paper proposes a micro-macro model for information diffusion in robot swarms where robots can only exchange information upon encounters, without scheduling capabilities, and validates it through simulations.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个微观-宏观模型，用于机器人群中基于偶遇的信息扩散。在该模型中，机器人只能在相遇时交换信息，且不能进行调度。论文通过仿真验证该模型。
summary_zh: 本文提出了基于偶遇驱动的信息扩散（EDID）问题。在EDID中，只有在机器人相遇时才允许它们交换信息。关键在于，EDID假设机器人不允许安排它们的相遇。因此，机器人无法预测何时、何地以及与谁相遇。作为设计EDID存储和路由算法的第一步，本文提出了一个信息扩散模型，该模型捕捉了EDID的基本动态特性。该模型从第一性原理推导，由两个层次组成：一个基于“平均自由程”概念推广的微观模型；以及一个捕捉信息扩散全局动态的宏观模型。我们通过大量的机器人仿真验证了该模型，仿真中考虑了群体规模、通信范围、环境大小以及不同的随机运动机制。最后，我们讨论了该模型对于根据感兴趣的参数选择最支持信息扩散的算法的影响。

title: Visual Cooperative Drone Tracking for Open-Path Gas Measurements
summary: Open-path Tunable Diode Laser Absorption Spectroscopy offers an effective method for measuring, mapping, and monitoring gas concentrations, such as leaking CO2 or methane. Compared to spatial sampling of gas distributions using in-situ sensors, open-path sensors in combination with gas tomography algorithms can cover large outdoor environments faster in a non-invasive way. However, the requirement of a dedicated reflection surface for the open-path laser makes automating the spatial sampling process challenging. This publication presents a robotic system for collecting open-path measurements, making use of a sensor mounted on a ground-based pan-tilt unit and a small drone carrying a reflector. By means of a zoom camera, the ground unit visually tracks red LED markers mounted on the drone and aligns the sensor's laser beam with the reflector. Incorporating GNSS position information provided by the drone's flight controller further improves the tracking approach. Outdoor experiments validated the system's performance, demonstrating successful autonomous tracking and valid CO2 measurements at distances up to 60 meters. Furthermore, the system successfully measured a CO2 plume without interference from the drone's propulsion system, demonstrating its superiority compared to flying in-situ sensors.
tldr: This paper presents a robotic system using a ground-based sensor and a drone with a reflector for automated open-path gas measurements via laser spectroscopy, validated through CO2 plume measurement.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种机器人系统，该系统使用地面传感器和带有反射器的无人机，通过激光光谱法自动进行开放路径气体测量，并通过 CO2 羽流测量进行了验证。
summary_zh: 开放路径可调谐二极管激光吸收光谱法提供了一种有效的方法来测量、绘制和监测气体浓度，例如泄漏的二氧化碳或甲烷。与使用原位传感器对气体分布进行空间采样相比，开放路径传感器与气体层析成像算法相结合，可以以非侵入的方式更快地覆盖大型户外环境。然而，开放路径激光器需要专用的反射面，这使得空间采样过程的自动化具有挑战性。本出版物介绍了一种用于收集开放路径测量的机器人系统，该系统利用安装在地面云台上的传感器和一架携带反射器的小型无人机。通过变焦相机，地面单元视觉跟踪安装在无人机上的红色LED标记，并将传感器的激光束与反射器对齐。结合无人机飞行控制器提供的GNSS位置信息，进一步改进了跟踪方法。户外实验验证了该系统的性能，表明在高达60米的距离上实现了成功的自主跟踪和有效的二氧化碳测量。此外，该系统成功地测量了一个二氧化碳羽流，且不受无人机推进系统的干扰，证明了其优于飞行原位传感器。

title: Dual-Branch INS/GNSS Fusion with Inequality and Equality Constraints
summary: Reliable vehicle navigation in urban environments remains a challenging problem due to frequent satellite signal blockages caused by tall buildings and complex infrastructure. While fusing inertial reading with satellite positioning in an extended Kalman filter provides short-term navigation continuity, low-cost inertial sensors suffer from rapid error accumulation during prolonged outages. Existing information aiding approaches, such as the non-holonomic constraint, impose rigid equality assumptions on vehicle motion that may be violated under dynamic urban driving conditions, limiting their robustness precisely when aiding is most needed. In this paper, we propose a dual-branch information aiding framework that fuses equality and inequality motion constraints through a variance-weighted scheme, requiring only a software modification to an existing navigation filter with no additional sensors or hardware. The proposed method is evaluated on four publicly available urban datasets featuring various inertial sensors, road conditions, and dynamics, covering a total duration of 4.3 hours of recorded data. Under Full GNSS availability, the method reduces vertical position error by 16.7% and improves altitude accuracy by 50.1% over the standard non-holonomic constraint. Under GNSS-denied conditions, vertical drift is reduced by 24.2% and altitude accuracy improves by 20.2%. These results demonstrate that replacing hard motion equality assumptions with physically motivated inequality bounds is a practical and cost-free strategy for improving navigation resilience, continuity, and drift robustness without relying on additional sensors, map data, or learned models.
tldr: The paper introduces a dual-branch INS/GNSS fusion method using both equality and inequality motion constraints to improve navigation in urban environments with GNSS outages. The method achieves improved accuracy and robustness without requiring additional sensors or hardware.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种双分支INS/GNSS融合方法，该方法结合了等式和不等式运动约束，以提高在GNSS中断的城市环境中导航的准确性。该方法在不需要额外传感器或硬件的情况下，实现了更高的精度和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 在城市环境中实现可靠的车辆导航仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，这是由于高层建筑和复杂基础设施经常导致卫星信号阻塞。虽然在扩展卡尔曼滤波器中融合惯性数据和卫星定位可以提供短期的导航连续性，但低成本的惯性传感器在长时间的信号中断期间会遭受快速的误差累积。现有的信息辅助方法，例如非完整约束，对车辆运动施加了严格的等式假设，这些假设在动态城市驾驶条件下可能被违反，这限制了它们在最需要辅助时期的鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了一种双分支信息辅助框架，该框架通过方差加权方案融合等式和不等式运动约束，只需对现有导航滤波器进行软件修改，而无需额外的传感器或硬件。所提出的方法在四个公开的城市数据集中进行了评估，这些数据集具有各种惯性传感器、道路状况和动力学，涵盖了总共 4.3 小时的记录数据。在完全 GNSS 可用性下，该方法将垂直位置误差降低了 16.7%，并将高度精度提高了 50.1%，优于标准的非完整约束。在 GNSS 受限条件下，垂直漂移降低了 24.2%，高度精度提高了 20.2%。这些结果表明，用物理驱动的不等式边界替代硬性运动等式假设是一种实用的且零成本的策略，可以在不依赖额外的传感器、地图数据或学习模型的情况下，提高导航的弹性、连续性和漂移鲁棒性。

title: Acoustic Feedback for Closed-Loop Force Control in Robotic Grinding
summary:
Acoustic feedback is a critical indicator for assessing the contact condition between the tool and the workpiece when humans perform grinding tasks with rotary tools. In contrast, robotic grinding systems typically rely on force sensing, with acoustic information largely ignored. This reliance on force sensors is costly and difficult to adapt to different grinding tools, whereas audio sensors (microphones) are low-cost and can be mounted on any medium that conducts grinding sound.
  This paper introduces a low-cost Acoustic Feedback Robotic Grinding System (AFRG) that captures audio signals with a contact microphone, estimates grinding force from the audio in real time, and enables closed-loop force control of the grinding process. Compared with conventional force-sensing approaches, AFRG achieves a 4-fold improvement in consistency across different grinding disc conditions. AFRG relies solely on a low-cost microphone, which is approximately 200-fold cheaper than conventional force sensors, as the sensing modality, providing an easily deployable, cost-effective robotic grinding solution.
tldr: This paper presents a low-cost robotic grinding system (AFRG) that uses acoustic feedback from a microphone to estimate grinding force and enable closed-loop force control, achieving better consistency and lower cost compared to force sensor-based systems.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种低成本的机器人磨削系统 (AFRG)，该系统利用来自麦克风的声学反馈来估计磨削力，并实现闭环力控制。与基于力传感器的系统相比，该系统具有更好的一致性和更低的成本。
summary_zh:
声反馈是评估人使用旋转工具进行研磨任务时，工具与工件之间接触状况的关键指标。相比之下，机器人研磨系统通常依赖于力传感，而声学信息在很大程度上被忽略。 这种对力传感器的依赖成本高昂，且难以适应不同的研磨工具，而音频传感器（麦克风）成本低廉，并且可以安装在任何传导研磨声音的介质上。

本文介绍了一种低成本的声反馈机器人研磨系统（AFRG），该系统利用接触式麦克风捕获音频信号，实时估计音频中的研磨力，并实现研磨过程的闭环力控制。与传统的力传感方法相比，AFRG在不同研磨盘条件下实现了4倍的一致性提升。作为传感方式，AFRG仅依赖于一个低成本的麦克风，其成本约为传统力传感器的1/200，从而提供了一种易于部署、经济高效的机器人研磨解决方案。

title: Energy-Based Injury Protection Database: Including Shearing Contact Thresholds for Hand and Finger Using Porcine Surrogates
summary: While robotics research continues to propose strategies for collision avoidance in human-robot interaction, the reality of constrained environments and future humanoid systems makes contact inevitable. To mitigate injury risks, energy-constraining control approaches are commonly used, often relying on safety thresholds derived from blunt impact data in EN ISO 10218-2:2025. However, this dataset does not extend to edged or pointed collisions. Without scalable, clinically grounded datasets covering diverse contact scenarios, safety validation remains limited. Previous studies have laid the groundwork by assessing surrogate-based velocity and mass limits across various geometries, focusing on perpendicular impacts. This study expands those datasets by including shearing contact scenarios in unconstrained collisions, revealing that collision angle significantly affects injury outcomes. Notably, unconstrained shearing contacts result in fewer injuries than perpendicular ones. By reevaluating all prior porcine surrogate data, we establish energy thresholds across geometries and contact types, forming the first energy-based Injury Protection Database. This enables the development of meaningful energy-limiting controllers that ensure safety across a wide range of realistic collision events.
tldr: This paper introduces an energy-based Injury Protection Database incorporating shearing contact thresholds for hand and finger injuries in human-robot interaction, using porcine surrogates. The study reveals that collision angle significantly affects injury outcomes, establishing energy thresholds across geometries and contact types.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个基于能量的损伤保护数据库，该数据库结合了人机交互中手和手指受到剪切接触的阈值，该研究使用了猪的替代物。这项研究表明，碰撞角度显著影响损伤结果，从而建立了跨几何形状和接触类型的能量阈值。
